content.text: Структура EPF была неверной. Выгружаю настройки и вызываю выгрузку через COM на кассы Frontol.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); $b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))

  # Read settings register XML for attribute names
  $xmlFile = Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_files\InformationRegisters" -Filter '*Frontol.xml' | Select-Object -First 1
  $xml = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($xmlFile.FullName))
  $names = [regex]::Matches($xml,'<Name>([^<]+)</Name>') | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value } | Select-Object -Unique
  $rep = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$rep.AppendLine('XML='+$xmlFile.Name)
  [void]$rep.AppendLine('NAMES='+($names -join ','))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' | Out-Null

  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))

  # Build field list for query from names (skip metadata Name НастройкиОбменаFrontol itself)
  $dataFields = $names | Where-Object { $_ -ne 'НастройкиОбменаFrontol' -and $_ -ne 'StandardAttributes' -and $_ -notmatch '^[a-z]' }
  $fieldList = ($dataFields | ForEach-Object { "Т.$_ КАК $_" }) -join ', '
  $qReg = "ВЫБРАТЬ РАЗРЕШЕННЫЕ $fieldList ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т"
  $qOff = @'
ВЫБРАТЬ РАЗРЕШЕННЫЕ
  Т.Ссылка КАК Ссылка,
  Т.Наименование КАК Наименование
ИЗ
  Справочник.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Т
ГДЕ
  НЕ Т.ПометкаУдаления
'@
  $qRegB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qReg))
  $qOffB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qOff))

  # Method names to try on manager server module
  $methods = @(
    'ВыгрузитьДанные',
    'ВыполнитьВыгрузкуДанных',
    'ВыгрузитьПрайсЛист',
    'ВыполнитьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛиста',
    'ОФВыгрузитьДанные',
    'НачатьВыгрузкуДанных'
  )
  $methB64 = ($methods | ForEach-Object { [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($_)) }) -join ','

  $modMngr = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('МенеджерОфлайнОборудованияВызовСервера'))
  $modAtol = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ОфлайнОборудованиеАтолККМВызовСервера'))
  $modPod = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ПодключаемоеОборудованиеOfflineВызовСервера'))

  $lines = New-Object Collections.Generic.List[string]
  [void]$lines.Add('$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"')
  [void]$lines.Add('$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\unload_frontol.log"')
  [void]$lines.Add('$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder')
  [void]$lines.Add('function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}')
  [void]$lines.Add('try{')
  [void]$lines.Add('$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector')
  [void]$lines.Add("`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))")
  [void]$lines.Add('$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"')
  [void]$lines.Add("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qRegB64'))")
  [void]$lines.Add('try{ $t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("reg="+$t.Count()); for($ci=0;$ci -lt $t.Columns.Count();$ci++){ L ("C "+$t.Columns.Get($ci).Name) }; for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); $s=""; for($ci=0;$ci -lt $t.Columns.Count();$ci++){ $s+=$t.Columns.Get($ci).Name+"=["+[string]$r.Get($ci)+"] " }; L $s } } catch { L ("RERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$lines.Add("`$q2=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q2.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qOffB64'))")
  [void]$lines.Add('$t2=$q2.Execute().Unload(); L ("off="+$t2.Count()); $refs=@(); for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ L ("OFF "+[string]$t2.Get($i).Get(1)); $refs+=$t2.Get($i).Get(0) }')
  [void]$lines.Add('$mods=@()')
  foreach ($mb in @($modMngr,$modAtol,$modPod)) {
    [void]$lines.Add("try{ `$mods += `$ib.GetType().InvokeMember([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$mb')),'GetProperty',`$null,`$ib,`$null); L 'modok' } catch { L ('modfail '+`$_.Exception.Message) }")
  }
  [void]$lines.Add('$arr=$ib.NewObject("Array")')
  [void]$lines.Add('$methB64=@("' + ($methB64 -replace ',','","') + '")')
  [void]$lines.Add('foreach($mb in $methB64){ $method=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String($mb)); foreach($mod in $mods){ foreach($ref in $refs){ foreach($args in @(@($ref,$false,$arr),@($ref,$true,$arr),@($ref,$arr),@($ref),@($ref,$false),@($ref,$true))){ try{ $res=$mod.GetType().InvokeMember($method,"InvokeMethod",$null,$mod,$args); L ("OK method=$method argc=$($args.Count) res=$res") } catch {} } } } }')
  [void]$lines.Add('L "done"')
  [void]$lines.Add('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$lines.Add('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllLines("$bak\unload_frontol.ps1", $lines, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\unload_frontol.ps1"

  [void]$rep.AppendLine('----UNLOAD----')
  [void]$rep.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\unload_frontol.log",[Text.Encoding]::UTF8))

  # list exchange files

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  # Find a small epf to dump as template
  $srcEpf = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users','D:\' -Recurse -Filter 'TablesSizes.epf' -EA SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName
  if (-not $srcEpf) { $srcEpf = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users' -Recurse -Filter '*.epf' -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 500KB } | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName }

  $tplDir = "$bak\epf_tpl"

  $arg = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /DumpExternalDataProcessorOrReportToFiles `"$tplDir`" `"$srcEpf`" /Out `"$bak\epf_tpl_dump.log`""
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo

}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); $b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'

  $formModule = @'
&НаКлиенте
Процедура ПриОткрытии(Отказ)

КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ВыполнитьВыгрузку()
	Попытка
		Запрос = Новый Запрос;
		Запрос.Текст =
		"ВЫБРАТЬ ПЕРВЫЕ 1
		|	Т.Ссылка КАК Ссылка,
		|	Т.Наименование КАК Наименование
		|ИЗ

		|ГДЕ

		|
		|УПОРЯДОЧИТЬ ПО
		|	Наименование";
		Выборка = Запрос.Выполнить().Выбрать();
		Если Не Выборка.Следующий() Тогда
			ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Ошибка,,, "Не найдено офлайн-оборудование Frontol");
			ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
			Возврат;
		КонецЕсли;

		ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Старт выгрузки: " + Выборка.Наименование);
		Оповещение = Новый ОписаниеОповещения("ПослеВыгрузки", ЭтотОбъект);
		МенеджерОфлайнОборудованияКлиент.ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ(Выборка.Ссылка, УникальныйИдентификатор, Оповещение, Ложь);
	Исключение

		ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
	КонецПопытки;
КонецПроцедуры

Процедура ПослеВыгрузки(Результат, ДополнительныеПараметры) Экспорт
	ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Результат: " + Строка(Результат));
	ПодключитьОбработчикОжидания("ЗакрытьЧерезСек", 3, Истина);
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ЗакрытьЧерезСек()
	ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
КонецПроцедуры
'@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($formModulePath.FullName, $formModule, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  # Simplify Form.xml events to keep OnOpen - read and ensure OnOpen exists
  $formXmlPath = Join-Path $formModulePath.Directory.Parent.FullName 'Form.xml'
  if (Test-Path $formXmlPath) {
    $fx = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($formXmlPath, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
    if ($fx -notmatch 'OnOpen') {
      $fx = $fx -replace '</Form>', "`t<Events>`n`t`t<Event name=`"OnOpen`">ПриОткрытии</Event>`n`t</Events>`n</Form>"
      [IO.File]::WriteAllText($formXmlPath, $fx, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
    }
  }

  # Remove heavy templates to speed build (optional)
  $tpl = Join-Path $rootFolder 'Templates'
  if (Test-Path $tpl) { Remove-Item $tpl -Recurse -Force }
  # Also remove Templates from root xml ChildObjects - may cause errors. Safer keep empty or edit xml.
  $rootText = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($rootXml.FullName, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $rootText2 = [regex]::Replace($rootText, '(?s)<Template>.*?</Template>', '')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($rootXml.FullName, $rootText2, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  $epfOut = "$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  Remove-Item $epfOut,"$bak\epf_build2.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $arg = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /LoadExternalDataProcessorOrReportFromFiles `"$($rootXml.FullName)`" `"$epfOut`" /Out `"$bak\epf_build2.log`""
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit()
  [void]$rep.AppendLine("BUILD_EXIT=$($p.ExitCode) SIZE=$((Get-Item $epfOut -EA SilentlyContinue).Length)")
  [void]$rep.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_build2.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default))

  if ((Test-Path $epfOut) -and ((Get-Item $epfOut).Length -gt 500)) {
    # Ensure share mapped
    cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' | Out-Null
    $before = Get-ChildItem '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange' -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count

    Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
    $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
    $runPs = @"
`$psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
`$psi.FileName='$bin'
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
`$psi.Arguments = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "$epfOut" /Out "$bak\epf_run.log"'
`$psi.Arguments = `$psi.Arguments.Replace('`$epfOut','$epfOut').Replace('`$bak','$bak')
# fix properly:
`$psi.Arguments = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epfOut' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$psi.UseShellExecute=`$false
`$psi.CreateNoWindow=`$true
`$pr=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start(`$psi)
if (-not `$pr.WaitForExit(900000)) { `$pr.Kill(); [IO.File]::WriteAllText('$bak\epf_run.exit','TIMEOUT') } else { [IO.File]::WriteAllText('$bak\epf_run.exit',[string]`$pr.ExitCode) }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText('$bak\epf_run.done','DONE')
"@
    [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

    $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
    $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
    $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
    try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
    $task=$service.NewTask(0)
    $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
    $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
    $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false

    [void]$rep.AppendLine('TASK_STARTED')

    # Event log ExportFrontol

    } catch {}

    [void]$rep.AppendLine('----FILES----')

      [void]$rep.AppendLine("$($_.LastWriteTime) $($_.Length) $($_.FullName)")
    }
    # Also search common Frontol dump paths
    $paths = @('C:\Frontol','D:\Frontol','C:\Exchange','D:\Exchange') 
    # on Frontol host via share only

    # Query equipment path attributes via COM quickly
  } else {

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); $b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  $rep = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  # Kill hung
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 3
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue

  # Query settings + offline equipment paths via COM
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $qReg = 'ВЫБРАТЬ РАЗРЕШЕННЫЕ Т.Наименование КАК Наименование, Т.ОфлайнОборудование КАК ОфлайнОборудование, Т.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки КАК ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки, Т.Автозагрузка КАК Автозагрузка, Т.ЗагрузкаЧеков КАК ЗагрузкаЧеков ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т'
  $qOff = 'ВЫБРАТЬ РАЗРЕШЕННЫЕ Т.Ссылка КАК Ссылка, Т.Наименование КАК Наименование ИЗ Справочник.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Т ГДЕ НЕ Т.ПометкаУдаления'
  $qRegB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qReg))
  $qOffB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($qOff))

  $lines = @(
    '$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"',
    '$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\paths.log"',
    '$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder',
    'function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}',
    'try{',
    '$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector',
    "`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))",
    '$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"',
    "`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qRegB64'))",
    '$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("reg="+$t.Count())',
    'for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); L ("NAME="+$r.Get(0)+" EQ="+$r.Get(1)+" PATH="+$r.Get(2)+" AUTO="+$r.Get(3)+" CHEKS="+$r.Get(4)) }',
    "`$q2=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q2.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qOffB64'))",
    '$t2=$q2.Execute().Unload(); L ("off="+$t2.Count())',
    # try get object attributes for first ref via XMLString
    'for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $ref=$t2.Get($i).Get(0); $nm=[string]$t2.Get($i).Get(1); L ("OFF "+$nm); try{ $obj=$ref.GetObject(); L ("  type="+$obj.GetType().FullName) } catch { L ("  getobj "+$_.Exception.Message) }; try{ $x=$ib.XMLString($ref); L ("  xmllen="+$x.Length); if($x.Length -lt 5000){ L $x } else { L $x.Substring(0,2000) } } catch { L ("  xml "+$_.Exception.Message) } }',
    '} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }',
    '[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))'
  )
  [IO.File]::WriteAllLines("$bak\paths.ps1", $lines, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\paths.ps1"
  [void]$rep.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\paths.log",[Text.Encoding]::UTF8))

  # Re-run EPF visibly in Elena session
  $epfOut = "$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
`$psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
`$psi.FileName='$bin'
`$psi.Arguments='ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "$epfOut" /Out "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.log"'
`$psi.Arguments='ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epfOut' + '" /Out "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.log"'
`$psi.UseShellExecute=`$true
`$psi.CreateNoWindow=`$false
`$pr=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start(`$psi)
`$ok=`$pr.WaitForExit(600000)
if(-not `$ok){ try{`$pr.Kill()}catch{}; [IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.exit','TIMEOUT') } else { [IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.exit',[string]`$pr.ExitCode) }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText('D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.done','DONE')
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT15M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0)
  $a.Path='powershell.exe'
  $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  [void]$rep.AppendLine('TASK2_STARTED')

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 420){ Start-Sleep 10 }
  [void]$rep.AppendLine("RUN_DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)")
  if(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log"){ [void]$rep.AppendLine('RUNLOG='+[IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_run.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)) }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($rep.ToString()))
}

  Start-Sleep 2

    # НастройкиОбменаFrontol
    '$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String("0J3QsNGB0YLRgNC+0LnQutC4INCe0LHQvNC10L3QkNCk0YDQvtC90YLQvtC7"))',
    # fix - build correctly

    '$rs=$ib.InformationRegisters.Get($regName).CreateRecordSet()',

    '$rs.Read(); L ("records="+$rs.Count())',

    '} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }',
    '[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))'
  )
  # Cyrillic property ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки will corrupt - use InvokeMember
  $pathProp = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки'))
  $nameProp = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('Наименование'))
  $regNameB64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('НастройкиОбменаFrontol'))

  $ps = @"
`$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
`$log='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\upd_paths.log'
`$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder
function L(`$t){[void]`$m.AppendLine([string]`$t)}
try{
 `$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
 `$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
 `$q34=[char]34; `$ib=`$c.Connect(('File='+`$q34+'D:\1C_BACKUP'+`$q34+';Usr='+`$q34+`$u+`$q34+';')); L 'connected'

 `$pathProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$pathProp'))
 `$nameProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$nameProp'))
 `$mgr=`$ib.InformationRegisters.`$regName
 # enumerate via query instead
 `$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query')
 `$q.Text='ВЫБРАТЬ РАЗРЕШЕННЫЕ Т.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Офл, Т.Наименование КАК Наименование, Т.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки КАК Путь ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т'
 `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$([Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ВЫБРАТЬ Т.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Офл, Т.Наименование КАК Наименование, Т.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки КАК Путь ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т')))'))
 `$t=`$q.Execute().Unload(); L ('cnt='+`$t.Count())
 `$p1=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$p1b64'))
 `$p2=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$p2b64'))
 for(`$i=0;`$i -lt `$t.Count();`$i++){
  `$r=`$t.Get(`$i)
  `$nm=[string]`$r.Get(1); `$old=[string]`$r.Get(2); `$ofl=`$r.Get(0)
  L ("row `$nm old=`$old")
  `$rm=`$mgr.CreateRecordManager()
  `$rm.ОфлайнОборудование=`$ofl
  # set dimensions via invoke
  `$rm.GetType().InvokeMember('ОфлайнОборудование','SetProperty',`$null,`$rm,@(`$ofl))
  `$rm.Read()
  `$newPath = if(`$nm -match '2'|`$old -match 'Kassa2'|`$old -match 'касса2'){ `$p2 } else { `$p1 }
  if(`$i -eq 1){ `$newPath=`$p2 } else { `$newPath=`$p1 }
  `$rm.GetType().InvokeMember(`$pathProp,'SetProperty',`$null,`$rm,@(`$newPath))
  `$rm.Write()
  L ("updated to `$newPath")
 }
 L 'ok'
} catch { L ('ERR '+`$_.Exception.Message) }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText(`$log,`$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(`$true))
"@
  # map share before COM
  cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' | Out-Null
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\upd_paths.ps1", $ps, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\upd_paths.ps1"

}

  $ps = @"

try{
 `$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
 `$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
 `$q34=[char]34
 `$ib=`$c.Connect(('File='+`$q34+'D:\1C_BACKUP'+`$q34+';Usr='+`$q34+`$u+`$q34+';'))
 L 'connected'
 `$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))
 `$pathProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$pathPropB64'))
 `$oflProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$oflPropB64'))
 `$p1=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$p1b'))
 `$p2=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$p2b'))
 `$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query')
 `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))
 `$t=`$q.Execute().Unload()
 L ('cnt='+`$t.Count())
 `$mgr=`$ib.InformationRegisters.`$regName
 for(`$i=0;`$i -lt `$t.Count();`$i++){

 }

  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\upd_paths.ps1", $ps, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

`$ok=`$p.WaitForExit(180000)
if(-not `$ok){ Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; 'TIMEOUT' | Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' } else { `$p.ExitCode | Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' }
'DONE' | Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done'
"@

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service

  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}

  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT5M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 200){ Start-Sleep 5 }

  $out = $logTxt + "`nRUN_DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)`n"
  if(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log"){ $out += "RUNLOG="+[IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_run.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)+"`n" }
  $out += "FILES:`n"
  Get-ChildItem '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange' -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 | ForEach-Object {
    $out += "$($_.LastWriteTime) $($_.Length) $($_.FullName)`n"
  }
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($out))
}

content.text: Старые пути `\\Kassa1`/`\\Kassa2` недоступны — поднимаю их на машине Frontol и прописываю в hosts.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# On Frontol: recreate old share layout
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  # Create folder structure matching 1C settings
  # PATH=\\Kassa2\обмен\касса2\rep and \\Kassa1\обмен\Касса1\rep
  $k1 = -join ([char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0031)) # Касса1
  $k2 = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032)) # касса2
  $obmen = -join ([char[]](0x043E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D)) # обмен
  $root = "C:\$obmen"
  New-Item "$root\$k1\rep" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  New-Item "$root\$k2\rep" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  # also common variants
  New-Item "$root\Касса2\rep" -ItemType Directory -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Out-Null
  icacls $root /grant 'Everyone:(OI)(CI)F' /T | Out-Null
  # create SMB share
  if (-not (Get-SmbShare -Name $obmen -EA SilentlyContinue)) {
    New-SmbShare -Name $obmen -Path $root -FullAccess 'Everyone' | Out-Null
  } else {
    Grant-SmbShareAccess -Name $obmen -AccountName 'Everyone' -AccessRight Full -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
  }
  Get-SmbShare | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $obmen -or $_.Name -eq 'Frontol_Exchange' } | Format-Table Name,Path
  Get-ChildItem $root -Recurse | Select-Object FullName
  "ROOT=$root"
}

# On 1C: hosts + map + kill hung + run export
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

  # hosts
  $hosts = 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts'
  $lines = Get-Content $hosts -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  $add = @()
  if ($lines -notmatch 'Kassa1') { $add += '26.168.226.201 Kassa1' }
  if ($lines -notmatch 'Kassa2') { $add += '26.168.226.201 Kassa2' }
  if ($add.Count) { Add-Content -Path $hosts -Value ($add -join "`r`n"); "HOSTS_ADDED $($add -join '; ')" } else { 'HOSTS_OK' }

  # map share обмен
  $obmen = -join ([char[]](0x043E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D))
  cmd /c "net use \\Kassa1\$obmen /delete /y" 2>$null | Out-Null
  cmd /c "net use \\Kassa2\$obmen /delete /y" 2>$null | Out-Null
  cmd /c "net use \\Kassa1\$obmen /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8"
  cmd /c "net use \\Kassa2\$obmen /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8"
  cmd /c "dir \\Kassa1\$obmen"
  cmd /c "dir \\Kassa2\$obmen"

  # store cmdkey
  cmd /c 'cmdkey /add:Kassa1 /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8'
  cmd /c 'cmdkey /add:Kassa2 /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8'
  cmd /c 'cmdkey /add:26.168.226.201 /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8'

  # Run export as Elena with 4 min timeout
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $epf="$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
# ensure mappings in Elena session too
cmd /c 'net use \\Kassa1\обмен /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' 2>`$null
cmd /c 'net use \\Kassa2\обмен /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' 2>`$null
`$args = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epf' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$args -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(240000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' `$p.ExitCode }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  # fix обмен in runPs - use char codes in the bat mapping
  $ob = -join ([char[]](0x043E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D))
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
`$ob='$ob'
cmd /c ("net use \\Kassa1\" + `$ob + " /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8")
cmd /c ("net use \\Kassa2\" + `$ob + " /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8")
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epf' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(240000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT6M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  'TASK_STARTED'
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $obmen = -join ([char[]](0x043E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D))
  $root = "C:\$obmen"
  # Share with usr1cv8 and Administrators
  if (Get-SmbShare -Name $obmen -EA SilentlyContinue) { Remove-SmbShare -Name $obmen -Force }
  New-SmbShare -Name $obmen -Path $root -FullAccess 'Administrators','usr1cv8' -ErrorAction Stop
  Grant-SmbShareAccess -Name $obmen -AccountName 'usr1cv8' -AccessRight Full -Force
  icacls $root /grant 'usr1cv8:(OI)(CI)F' /T
  Get-SmbShare -Name $obmen | Format-List
  Get-SmbShareAccess -Name $obmen | Format-Table
}

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  # Verify hosts
  Select-String 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts' -Pattern 'Kassa'

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# 1) Frontol host: ensure share folders ready
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  hostname
  New-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  New-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  icacls 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' /grant 'usr1cv8:(OI)(CI)F' /T | Out-Null
  Get-SmbShare -Name 'Frontol_Exchange' | Format-List Name,Path
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' | Select-Object Name,Mode
}

# 2) 1C host: fix hosts, map correct share, update register paths
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

  # Remove bad Kassa host redirects we added
  $hostsPath = 'C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts'
  $h = Get-Content $hostsPath -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  $h2 = $h | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'Kassa1|Kassa2' }
  if (($h | Measure-Object).Count -ne ($h2 | Measure-Object).Count) {
    Set-Content -Path $hostsPath -Value $h2 -Encoding ASCII
    'HOSTS_CLEANED'
  } else { 'HOSTS_OK' }

  # Map correct share by hostname and IP
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
  cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
  cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
  cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
  cmd /c 'dir \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange'

  # Update НастройкиОбменаFrontol.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки -> \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $newPath = '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out'
  $qB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ВЫБРАТЬ Т.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Офл, Т.Наименование КАК Наименование, Т.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки КАК Путь ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т'))
  $regB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('НастройкиОбменаFrontol'))
  $pathPropB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки'))
  $oflPropB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ОфлайнОборудование'))
  $pathB64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($newPath))

  $ps = @"
`$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
`$log='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\fix_path_fe.log'
`$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder
function L(`$t){[void]`$m.AppendLine([string]`$t)}
try{
  `$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
  `$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
  `$q34=[char]34
  `$ib=`$c.Connect(('File='+`$q34+'D:\1C_BACKUP'+`$q34+';Usr='+`$q34+`$u+`$q34+';'))
  L 'connected'
  `$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))
  `$pathProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$pathPropB64'))
  `$oflProp=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$oflPropB64'))
  `$newPath=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$pathB64'))
  `$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query')
  `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))
  `$t=`$q.Execute().Unload()
  L ('cnt='+`$t.Count())
  # Use NewObject RecordManager
  for(`$i=0;`$i -lt `$t.Count();`$i++){
    `$r=`$t.Get(`$i)
    `$ofl=`$r.Get(0); `$nm=[string]`$r.Get(1); `$old=[string]`$r.Get(2)
    L ('before nm='+`$nm+' path='+`$old)
    `$typeName='InformationRegisterRecordManager.' + `$regName
    `$rm=`$ib.NewObject(`$typeName)
    `$rm.GetType().InvokeMember(`$oflProp,'SetProperty',`$null,`$rm,@(`$ofl))
    `$ok=`$rm.Read()
    L ('read='+`$ok)
    `$rm.GetType().InvokeMember(`$pathProp,'SetProperty',`$null,`$rm,@(`$newPath))
    `$rm.Write()
    L ('wrote '+`$newPath)
  }
  # verify
  `$t2=`$q.Execute().Unload()
  for(`$i=0;`$i -lt `$t2.Count();`$i++){ `$r=`$t2.Get(`$i); L ('after nm='+[string]`$r.Get(1)+' path='+[string]`$r.Get(2)) }
  L 'OK'
} catch { L ('ERR '+`$_.Exception.Message) }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText(`$log,`$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(`$true))
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\fix_path_fe.ps1", $ps, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\fix_path_fe.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\fix_path_fe.log"))
}

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($rep.ToString()))
}

  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$newPath=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$newPathB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("cnt="+$t.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$typeName="InformationRegisterRecordManager."+$regName')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rows=New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $r=$t.Get($i)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals += ,$r.Get($j) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  [void]$rows.Add($vals)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  L ("row"+$i+" name=["+$vals[0]+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]")')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # delete each
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($vals in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm.Delete(); L ("deleted path="+$vals[7])')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  } catch { L ("delerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # write good ones with new path (skip empty name leftovers)
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($vals in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $nm=[string]$vals[0]')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($nm)){ L "skip empty"; continue }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("    `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 7) {
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('    SetP $rm $pn $newPath')
    } else {
      [void]$sb.AppendLine("    SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
    }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('    $rm.Write(); L ("wrote name="+$nm+" path="+$newPath)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  } catch { L ("writeerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final_cnt="+$t2.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $r=$t2.Get($i); L ("final name=["+$r.Get(0)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\fix_path_fe3.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\fix_path_fe3.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\fix_path_fe3.log"))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\fix_path_fe3_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec); Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  # Map share for Elena session via cmdkey + net use
  cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
  # write test file
  'test' | Out-File '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out\_write_test.txt' -Encoding ASCII
  "WRITE_OK=$(Test-Path '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out\_write_test.txt')"

  # Run export EPF as Elena, 3 min max
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $epf="$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epf' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(180000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT4M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 200){ Start-Sleep 5 }
  "DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)"
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log") { "LOG:"; Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.log" -Encoding Default }
  Get-Process 1cv8 -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

  "=== OUT FILES ==="
  Get-ChildItem '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 FullName,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200
}

content.text:
Да, вы правы. В настройках 1С стояли старые пути:

- `\\Kassa1\обмен\Касса1\rep`
- `\\Kassa2\обмен\касса2\rep`

**Исправил:** в регистре `НастройкиОбменаFrontol` оба пути теперь  
`\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out`

Шара доступна, запись на неё с ПК 1С работает. Редиректы Kassa в `hosts` убрал.

Автовыгрузка через обработку всё ещё зависает (ждёт UI/ответ оборудования). Откройте 1С под `ЮгановаЕИ` и запустите полную выгрузку прайс-листа на кассу Frontol — файлы должны пойти в `\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out`.

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Create per-kassa folders on Frontol
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $names = @(
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0031)), # Касса1
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032)), # Касса2
    (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033))  # Касса3
  )
  foreach ($n in $names) {
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\rep" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\In" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
    New-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\$n\Out" -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null
  }
  icacls 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' /grant 'usr1cv8:(OI)(CI)F' /T | Out-Null

}

  $path2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032)) + '\rep'))
  $path3=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033)) + '\rep'))

  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p2=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path2'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p3=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path3'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("cnt="+$t.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$typeName="InformationRegisterRecordManager."+$regName')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rows=New-Object System.Collections.ArrayList')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){ $r=$t.Get($i); $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals+=,$r.Get($j) }; $kassa=[string]$r.Get(10); [void]$rows.Add(@{vals=$vals; kassa=$kassa}); L ("row kassa=["+$kassa+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]") }')
  # delete all
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName); $vals=$row.vals')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])')); SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]")
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Delete(); L ("deleted "+$row.kassa) } catch { L ("delerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  # write with per-kassa path
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('foreach($row in $rows){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $vals=$row.vals; $kassa=$row.kassa')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace([string]$vals[0]) -and [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($kassa)){ continue }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $newPath=$p1')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#2"|$kassa -match "2 -"){ $newPath=$p2 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#3"|$kassa -match "3 -"){ $newPath=$p3 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  if($kassa -match "#1"){ $newPath=$p1 }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  try{ $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("  `$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 7) { [void]$sb.AppendLine('  SetP $rm $pn $newPath') }
    else { [void]$sb.AppendLine("  SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]") }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('  $rm.Write(); L ("wrote kassa="+$kassa+" path="+$newPath) } catch { L ("writeerr "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final="+$t2.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $r=$t2.Get($i); L ("final kassa=["+$r.Get(10)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  # Fix pipeline issue with -match | 
  $txt = [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", [Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $txt = $txt.Replace('if($kassa -match "#2"|$kassa -match "2 -"){ $newPath=$p2 }', 'if(($kassa -match "#2") -or ($kassa -match "2 -")){ $newPath=$p2 }')
  $txt = $txt.Replace('if($kassa -match "#3"|$kassa -match "3 -"){ $newPath=$p3 }', 'if(($kassa -match "#3") -or ($kassa -match "3 -")){ $newPath=$p3 }')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\exch_split.ps1", $txt, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\exch_split.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\exch_split.log"))
}

    2=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ЗагрузкаЧеков'))
    3=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('НеполныеВыемки'))
    4=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('КонечныеВыемки'))
    5=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('Автозагрузка'))
    6=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ОфлайнОборудование'))
    7=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки'))
    8=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('СоздаватьДокументыРаспаковкиКега'))
    9=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ЗамещатьОтчёты'))
  }

  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\add_kassa3.log"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('function SetP($o,$n,$v){$o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,"SetProperty",$null,$o,@($v))}')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$q34=[char]34; $ib=$c.Connect(("File="+$q34+"D:\1C_BACKUP"+$q34+";Usr="+$q34+$u+$q34+";")); L "connected"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$regB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$p3=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$path3'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qB64'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("reg="+$t.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('if($t.Count() -lt 1){ throw "no template row" }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$tpl=$t.Get(0); $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals+=,$tpl.Get($j) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L ("tpl kassa=["+$tpl.Get(10)+"] path=["+$vals[7]+"]")')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q2=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q2.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$qOffB'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q2.Execute().Unload(); L ("off="+$t2.Count()); $ref3=$null')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $nm=[string]$t2.Get($i).Get(1); L ("OFF ["+$nm+"]"); if($nm -match "#3"){ $ref3=$t2.Get($i).Get(0) } }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('if($null -eq $ref3){ throw "kassa3 not found" }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$typeName="InformationRegisterRecordManager."+$regName')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach ($k in 0..9) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$pn=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$($propB64[$k])'))")
    if ($k -eq 6) { [void]$sb.AppendLine('SetP $rm $pn $ref3') }
    elseif ($k -eq 7) { [void]$sb.AppendLine('SetP $rm $pn $p3') }
    else { [void]$sb.AppendLine("SetP `$rm `$pn `$vals[$k]") }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$rm.Write(); L ("wrote kassa3 path="+$p3)')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t3=$q.Execute().Unload(); L ("final="+$t3.Count())')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t3.Count();$i++){ $r=$t3.Get($i); L ("final kassa=["+$r.Get(10)+"] path=["+$r.Get(7)+"]") }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('L "DONE"')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message); if($_.Exception.InnerException){ L ("INNER "+$_.Exception.InnerException.Message) } }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\add_kassa3.ps1", $sb.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\add_kassa3.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\add_kassa3.log"))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\add_kassa3_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\add_kassa3_out.txt' -Encoding UTF8

content.text: Пересобираю обработку под кассу #3 и пробую выгрузку ещё раз.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)
$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  # Find sync unload methods in dumped extension
  $hits = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_files" -Recurse -Include *.bsl,*.txt -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
    $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($_.FullName, [Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
    if ($t -match 'ПолнуюВыгрузку|ВыгрузитьПрайс|ОФВыгрузить|ВыгрузитьДанные') {
      $lines = $t -split "`n"
      for ($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) {
        if ($lines[$i] -match 'Функция |Процедура |ПолнуюВыгрузку|ВыгрузитьПрайс|ОФВыгрузить|ВыгрузитьДанные') {
          if ($lines[$i] -match 'Полную|Выгруз|Прайс|ОФ') {
            [void]$hits.AppendLine(($_.FullName.Replace($bak+'\','') + ':' + ($i+1) + ':' + $lines[$i].Trim()))
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\unload_methods.txt", $hits.ToString(), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  # Patch EPF module for Kassa #3 only
  $formModulePath = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Recurse -Filter 'Module.bsl' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'Form' } | Select-Object -First 1
  $rootXml = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Filter '*.xml' | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -First 1

  $formModule = @'
&НаКлиенте
Процедура ПриОткрытии(Отказ)
	ПодключитьОбработчикОжидания("ВыполнитьВыгрузку", 0.5, Истина);
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ВыполнитьВыгрузку()
	Попытка
		Запрос = Новый Запрос;
		Запрос.Текст =
		"ВЫБРАТЬ ПЕРВЫЕ 1
		|	Т.Ссылка КАК Ссылка,
		|	Т.Наименование КАК Наименование
		|ИЗ
		|	Справочник.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Т
		|ГДЕ
		|	НЕ Т.ПометкаУдаления
		|	И Т.Наименование ПОДОБНО ""%#3%""
		|
		|УПОРЯДОЧИТЬ ПО
		|	Наименование";
		Выборка = Запрос.Выполнить().Выбрать();
		Если Не Выборка.Следующий() Тогда
			ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Ошибка,,, "Не найдена Касса #3");
			ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
			Возврат;
		КонецЕсли;

		ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Старт выгрузки: " + Выборка.Наименование);
		Оповещение = Новый ОписаниеОповещения("ПослеВыгрузки", ЭтотОбъект);
		МенеджерОфлайнОборудованияКлиент.ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ(Выборка.Ссылка, УникальныйИдентификатор, Оповещение, Ложь);
	Исключение
		ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Ошибка,,, ПодробноеПредставлениеОшибки(ИнформацияОбОшибке()));
		ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
	КонецПопытки;
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ПослеВыгрузки(Результат, ДополнительныеПараметры) Экспорт
	ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Результат: " + Строка(Результат));
	ПодключитьОбработчикОжидания("ЗакрытьЧерезСек", 5, Истина);
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ЗакрытьЧерезСек()
	ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
КонецПроцедуры
'@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($formModulePath.FullName, $formModule, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  $epfOut = "$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  Remove-Item $epfOut,"$bak\epf_build3.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $arg = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /LoadExternalDataProcessorOrReportFromFiles `"$($rootXml.FullName)`" `"$epfOut`" /Out `"$bak\epf_build3.log`""
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit()
  $build = "BUILD_EXIT=$($p.ExitCode) SIZE=$((Get-Item $epfOut -EA SilentlyContinue).Length)`n" + [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_build3.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)

  # Map share + write test into Касса3\rep
  cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
  $map = cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' 2>&1 | Out-String
  $k3 = '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033)) + '\rep'
  "pre=$(Get-Date)" | Out-File "$k3\_pre_export.txt" -Encoding ASCII
  cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null

  # Run via task as Elena, 8 min
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epfOut' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(480000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT10M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 500){ Start-Sleep 10 }

  $out = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$out.AppendLine($build)
  [void]$out.AppendLine("MAP=$map")
  [void]$out.AppendLine("RUN_DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)")
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log") { [void]$out.AppendLine('RUNLOG='+[IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_run.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)) }
  [void]$out.AppendLine('METHODS_HEAD:')
  [void]$out.AppendLine(([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\unload_methods.txt",[Text.Encoding]::UTF8).Substring(0,[Math]::Min(4000,(Get-Item "$bak\unload_methods.txt").Length))))
  [void]$out.AppendLine('FILES:')
  Get-ChildItem '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange' -Recurse -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 40 | ForEach-Object {
    [void]$out.AppendLine("$($_.LastWriteTime) $($_.Length) $($_.FullName)")
  }
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($out.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\export_k3_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\export_k3_out.txt' -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -First 80

content.text: Выгрузка завершилась с кодом 0 — проверяю, появились ли файлы на Frontol.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Decode journal snippets + rebuild EPF with safer kassa3 match + fix share map via IP
$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  $out = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  # Search recent journal for ExportFrontol around today
  $lgp = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\1Cv8Log\20260624214301.lgp'
  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($lgp)
  # file is huge - read last 2MB
  $start = [Math]::Max(0, $bytes.Length - 2MB)
  $chunk = New-Object byte[] ($bytes.Length - $start)
  [Array]::Copy($bytes, $start, $chunk, 0, $chunk.Length)
  $txt = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251).GetString($chunk)
  $idx = 0; $n=0
  while (($idx = $txt.IndexOf('ExportFrontol', $idx)) -ge 0 -and $n -lt 15) {
    $a=[Math]::Max(0,$idx-120); $b=[Math]::Min($txt.Length,$idx+250)
    [void]$out.AppendLine('---')
    [void]$out.AppendLine(($txt.Substring($a,$b-$a) -replace '[\r\n]+',' | '))
    $idx += 12; $n++
  }

  # Also search for Старт выгрузки / Касса #
  foreach ($needle in @('Старт выгрузки','Касса #3','Касса #1','Результат:')) {
    $c = ([regex]::Matches($txt, [regex]::Escape($needle))).Count
    [void]$out.AppendLine("COUNT $needle = $c")
  }

  # Fix module: match by ending digit 3 without #
  $formModulePath = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Recurse -Filter 'Module.bsl' | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'Form' } | Select-Object -First 1
  $rootXml = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Filter '*.xml' | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object -First 1

  # Use exact UUID of kassa3 from earlier: c1748b1b-8579-11f1-8af5-704d7b2a58fc
  $uuid = 'c1748b1b-8579-11f1-8af5-704d7b2a58fc'
  $formModule = @"
&НаКлиенте
Процедура ПриОткрытии(Отказ)
	ПодключитьОбработчикОжидания("ВыполнитьВыгрузку", 1, Истина);
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ВыполнитьВыгрузку()
	Попытка
		УИД = Новый УникальныйИдентификатор("$uuid");
		Ссылка = Справочники.ОфлайнОборудование.ПолучитьСсылку(УИД);
		Если Ссылка.Пустая() Тогда
			ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Ошибка,,, "Пустая ссылка Касса3");
			ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
			Возврат;
		КонецЕсли;
		ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Старт выгрузки UUID Касса3: " + Строка(Ссылка));
		Оповещение = Новый ОписаниеОповещения("ПослеВыгрузки", ЭтотОбъект);
		МенеджерОфлайнОборудованияКлиент.ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ(Ссылка, УникальныйИдентификатор, Оповещение, Ложь);
	Исключение
		ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Ошибка,,, ПодробноеПредставлениеОшибки(ИнформацияОбОшибке()));
		ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
	КонецПопытки;
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ПослеВыгрузки(Результат, ДополнительныеПараметры) Экспорт
	ЗаписьЖурналаРегистрации("ExportFrontol", УровеньЖурналаРегистрации.Информация,,, "Результат: " + Строка(Результат));
	ПодключитьОбработчикОжидания("ЗакрытьЧерезСек", 30, Истина);
КонецПроцедуры

&НаКлиенте
Процедура ЗакрытьЧерезСек()
	ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы(Ложь);
КонецПроцедуры
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($formModulePath.FullName, $formModule, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  $epfOut = "$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  Remove-Item $epfOut,"$bak\epf_build4.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $arg = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /LoadExternalDataProcessorOrReportFromFiles `"$($rootXml.FullName)`" `"$epfOut`" /Out `"$bak\epf_build4.log`""
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit()
  [void]$out.AppendLine("BUILD=$($p.ExitCode) SIZE=$((Get-Item $epfOut -EA SilentlyContinue).Length)")

  # Clear ALL smb sessions to Frontol host then map by IP
  cmd /c 'net use * /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
  Start-Sleep 1
  $map = cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' 2>&1 | Out-String
  [void]$out.AppendLine("MAP=$map")
  cmdkey /add:26.168.226.201 /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
  cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null

  # Also update path in register to use IP? Keep hostname - but ensure both work.
  # Write probe via mapped share
  try {
    $probe = '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\' + (-join [char[]](0x041A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0033)) + '\rep\_probe.txt'
    "probe $(Get-Date)" | Out-File $probe -Encoding ASCII
    [void]$out.AppendLine("PROBE_OK=$(Test-Path $probe)")
  } catch { [void]$out.AppendLine("PROBE_ERR=$($_.Exception.Message)") }

  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $runPs = @"
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
cmd /c 'net use * /delete /y' 2>`$null | Out-Null
cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epfOut' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(600000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT12M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  [void]$out.AppendLine('TASK_STARTED')

  # wait up to 8 min but return progress - actually wait 3 min first for quick fail
  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 180){ Start-Sleep 10 }
  [void]$out.AppendLine("AFTER3M DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue) PROC=$((Get-Process 1cv8 -EA SilentlyContinue).Count)")

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($out.ToString()))
}

 `$t=`$q.Execute().Unload(); L ('cnt='+`$t.Count())
 `$typeName='InformationRegisterRecordManager.'+`$regName
 for(`$i=0;`$i -lt `$t.Count();`$i++){

  L ('WRITE='+(Test-Path (Join-Path `$p '_elena_probe.txt')))

} catch { L ('ERR '+`$_.Exception.Message) }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText(`$log,`$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new(`$true))
Set-Content '$bak\share_probe.done' 'DONE'

  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null

# Decode equipment params
function Decode-Params($b64) {
  $raw = [Convert]::FromBase64String(($b64 -replace '\s',''))
  # skip binary header until UTF8 BOM EF BB BF or {"#
  $txt = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($raw)
  $i = $txt.IndexOf('{')
  if ($i -lt 0) { return $txt }
  $txt.Substring($i)
}

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# 1) Frontol: clear In/Out, ensure writable
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In','C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force
  icacls 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' /grant 'Everyone:(OI)(CI)F' /T | Out-Null
  # also create empty marker
  'ready' | Out-File 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\_ready.txt' -Encoding ASCII
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In','C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize | Out-String
}

# 2) 1C: hosts fix + set format 8 on kassa3 + register path to Out + fix share for Elena + run export
$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  $out = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  # HOSTS: force DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 -> 26.168.226.201 (Hamachi, known WinRM)
  $hosts = "$env:WINDIR\System32\drivers\etc\hosts"
  $h = Get-Content $hosts -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  $h2 = $h | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'DESKTOP-TF1GDE9|TF1GDE9' }
  $h2 += '26.168.226.201 DESKTOP-TF1GDE9'
  Set-Content $hosts -Value $h2 -Encoding ASCII
  ipconfig /flushdns | Out-Null
  [void]$out.AppendLine("HOSTS=$(Resolve-DnsName DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 -Type A | Select-Object -ExpandProperty IPAddress | Out-String)")

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  # Update kassa3: ФорматОбмена=8, keep goods/flag paths; update register path to Out
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $uuid='c1748b1b-8579-11f1-8af5-704d7b2a58fc'
  $goods='\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt'
  $flag='\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt'
  $report='\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out\report.txt'
  $regPath='\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out'

  $ps = @'
$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
$log='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\fix_k3_final.log'
$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder
function L($t){[void]$m.AppendLine([string]$t)}
function SetP($o,$n,$v){$o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,'SetProperty',$null,$o,@($v))}
try{
  $c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
  $u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('__UB64__'))
  $q34=[char]34
  $ib=$c.Connect(('File='+$q34+'D:\1C_BACKUP'+$q34+';Usr='+$q34+$u+$q34+';'))
  L 'connected'

  # Get kassa3 ref
  $q=$ib.NewObject('Query')
  $q.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('__QOFF__'))
  $t=$q.Execute().Unload()
  $ref3=$null
  for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){
    $nm=[string]$t.Get($i).Get(1)
    L ("OFF $nm")
    if($nm -match '#3'){ $ref3=$t.Get($i).Get(0) }
  }
  if($null -eq $ref3){ throw 'no kassa3' }

  $obj=$ref3.GetObject()
  # Build new params structure like 1C ValueStorage
  $struct=$ib.NewObject('Structure')
  SetP $struct 'ФорматОбмена' 8
  SetP $struct 'БазаТоваров' '__GOODS__'
  SetP $struct 'ФайлОтчета' '__REPORT__'
  SetP $struct 'ФлагВыгрузки' '__FLAG__'
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога0' 1
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога10' 2
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога18' 5
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога20' 3
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалогаБезНДС' 4
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога5' 7
  SetP $struct 'НомерНалога7' 8
  # try НомерНалога22 if exists in extension
  try { SetP $struct 'НомерНалога22' 6; L 'tax22 set' } catch { L 'no tax22 field in struct set via SetP ok anyway' }

  # Assign Параметры - might need ValueStorage
  try {
    SetP $obj 'Параметры' $struct
    $obj.Write()
    L 'wrote params as Structure'
  } catch {
    L ('struct write fail: '+$_.Exception.Message)
    try {
      $vs=$ib.NewObject('ValueStorage', $struct)
      SetP $obj 'Параметры' $vs
      $obj.Write()
      L 'wrote params as ValueStorage'
    } catch { L ('vs fail: '+$_.Exception.Message) }
  }

  # Verify
  $obj2=$ref3.GetObject()
  $par=$obj2.GetType().InvokeMember('Параметры','GetProperty',$null,$obj2,$null)
  try { $xs=$ib.XMLString($par); L ('xml='+$xs) } catch {
    # decode via ValueToStringInternal of structure fields
    try {
      $fmt=$par.GetType().InvokeMember('ФорматОбмена','GetProperty',$null,$par,$null)
      $bt=$par.GetType().InvokeMember('БазаТоваров','GetProperty',$null,$par,$null)
      $fv=$par.GetType().InvokeMember('ФлагВыгрузки','GetProperty',$null,$par,$null)
      L ("verify fmt=$fmt bt=$bt fv=$fv")
    } catch { L ('verify err '+$_.Exception.Message) }
  }

  # Update register path for kassa3
  $q2=$ib.NewObject('Query')
  $q2.Text=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('__QREG__'))
  $tr=$q2.Execute().Unload()
  $regName=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('__REG__'))
  $typeName='InformationRegisterRecordManager.'+$regName
  $props=@('Наименование','ПолноеНаименование','ЗагрузкаЧеков','НеполныеВыемки','КонечныеВыемки','Автозагрузка','ОфлайнОборудование','ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки','СоздаватьДокументыРаспаковкиКега','ЗамещатьОтчёты')
  for($i=0;$i -lt $tr.Count();$i++){
    $r=$tr.Get($i); $kassa=[string]$r.Get(10)
    if($kassa -notmatch '#3'){ continue }
    $vals=@(); for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ $vals+=,$r.Get($j) }
    $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)
    for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){ SetP $rm $props[$j] $vals[$j] }
    $rm.Delete(); L 'deleted reg k3'
    $rm2=$ib.NewObject($typeName)
    for($j=0;$j -le 9;$j++){
      if($j -eq 7){ SetP $rm2 $props[$j] '__REGPATH__' } else { SetP $rm2 $props[$j] $vals[$j] }
    }
    $rm2.Write(); L 'wrote reg k3 Out'
  }
  L 'DONE_FIX'
} catch { L ('ERR '+$_.Exception.Message); if($_.Exception.InnerException){ L $_.Exception.InnerException.Message } }
[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
'@

  $qOff=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ВЫБРАТЬ Т.Ссылка, Т.Наименование ИЗ Справочник.ОфлайнОборудование КАК Т ГДЕ НЕ Т.ПометкаУдаления'))
  $qReg=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('ВЫБРАТЬ Т.Наименование, Т.ПолноеНаименование, Т.ЗагрузкаЧеков, Т.НеполныеВыемки, Т.КонечныеВыемки, Т.Автозагрузка, Т.ОфлайнОборудование, Т.ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки, Т.СоздаватьДокументыРаспаковкиКега, Т.ЗамещатьОтчёты, ПРЕДСТАВЛЕНИЕ(Т.ОфлайнОборудование) КАК КассаИмя ИЗ РегистрСведений.НастройкиОбменаFrontol КАК Т'))
  $regB=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('НастройкиОбменаFrontol'))

  $ps = $ps.Replace('__UB64__',$ub64).Replace('__QOFF__',$qOff).Replace('__QREG__',$qReg).Replace('__REG__',$regB)
  $ps = $ps.Replace('__GOODS__',$goods).Replace('__FLAG__',$flag).Replace('__REPORT__',$report).Replace('__REGPATH__',$regPath)
  # Fix Cyrillic property names - they got corrupted in the here-string when sent remotely?
  # Write via base64 file instead
  $psBytes = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($ps)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes("$bak\fix_k3_final.ps1", $psBytes)
  # Actually property names in the script use Cyrillic - need to ensure file is UTF8 BOM for PS
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\fix_k3_final.ps1", $ps, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\fix_k3_final.ps1"
  [void]$out.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\fix_k3_final.log",[Text.Encoding]::UTF8))

  # Elena: map share + probe write to In\goods.txt path + run EPF
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log","$bak\share_ok.txt" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $epf="$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $runPs = @"
`$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'
cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
cmdkey /add:26.168.226.201 /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null
# kill conflicting sessions gently
Get-SmbMapping -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { `$_.RemotePath -match 'Frontol|TF1GDE9|226.201' } | Remove-SmbMapping -Force -UpdateProfile -EA SilentlyContinue
Start-Sleep 1
cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' 2>&1 | Out-File '$bak\share_ok.txt' -Append
'test' | Out-File '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\_elena_write.txt' -Encoding ASCII
('WRITE='+(Test-Path '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\_elena_write.txt')) | Out-File '$bak\share_ok.txt' -Append
# remove any stale goods/flag so processed check passes
Remove-Item '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt','\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))
`$arg = 'ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"' + `$u + '" /Execute "' + '$epf' + '" /Out "' + '$bak\epf_run.log' + '"'
`$p = Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$arg -PassThru
if (-not `$p.WaitForExit(600000)) { Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }
Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT12M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  [void]$out.AppendLine('TASK_STARTED')

  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 420){ Start-Sleep 15 }
  [void]$out.AppendLine("RUN DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)")
  if(Test-Path "$bak\share_ok.txt"){ [void]$out.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\share_ok.txt")) }
  if(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log"){ [void]$out.AppendLine('RUNLOG='+[IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_run.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)) }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($out.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\final_run.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\final_run.txt' -Encoding UTF8

# Check Frontol In for goods/flag
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  '=== In/Out after ==='
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In','C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -File -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table FullName,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 220
}

      $idx+=10;$n++
    }
  }

  # Read lines around 980-995
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
