$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Patch client module to safely set tax 22, and ensure default structure is used from extension
# Also patch СпискиНалогов to use Свойство
$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $dump="$bak\ext_dump2"
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  $out=New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  # Read client module exact lines 190-230
  $cli = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'АтолККМКлиент$' } | Select-Object -First 1
  $cliPath = Join-Path $cli.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  $t=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($cliPath,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $lines=$t -split "`r?`n"
  for($i=190;$i -le 230;$i++){ [void]$out.AppendLine("$($i+1)|$($lines[$i])") }

  # Patch: replace Налоги.НомерНалога22 = with Insert style for all tax assigns that use dot
  # Safer: after getting Налоги from default, force Insert all keys
  $needle = 'Налоги.НомерНалога22 = Параметры.НомерНалога22;'
  if($t -notmatch [regex]::Escape($needle)){
    # try find similar
    for($i=0;$i -lt $lines.Count;$i++){ if($lines[$i] -match 'НомерНалога22'){ [void]$out.AppendLine("FOUND $($i+1)|$($lines[$i])") } }
  } else {
    $t2 = $t.Replace(
      $needle,
      'Налоги.Вставить("НомерНалога22", Параметры.НомерНалога22);'
    )
    # Also patch other Налоги.НомерНалога* = to Insert for safety
    $t2 = [regex]::Replace($t2, 'Налоги\.(НомерНалога[А-Яа-яA-Za-z0-9]+)\s*=\s*Параметры\.\1;', 'Налоги.Вставить("$1", Параметры.$1);')
    [IO.File]::WriteAllText($cliPath, $t2, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
    [void]$out.AppendLine('PATCHED_CLIENT')
  }

  # Patch module1 line 988 to use safe access
  $m1 = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Автономности1$' } | Select-Object -First 1
  $m1Path = Join-Path $m1.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  $t1=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($m1Path,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $old = 'СтавкаНалога22.Вставить("НомерНалогаККМ", НалогиНаККМ.НомерНалога22);'
  $new = @'
Номер22 = 11;
	Если НалогиНаККМ.Свойство("НомерНалога22") Тогда
		Номер22 = НалогиНаККМ.НомерНалога22;
	КонецЕсли;
	СтавкаНалога22.Вставить("НомерНалогаККМ", Номер22);
'@
  if($t1.Contains($old)){
    $t1=$t1.Replace($old,$new)
    [IO.File]::WriteAllText($m1Path,$t1,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
    [void]$out.AppendLine('PATCHED_M1')
  } else {
    [void]$out.AppendLine('M1_NEEDLE_NOT_FOUND')
    for($i=0;$i -lt ($t1 -split "`n").Count;$i++){ $l=($t1 -split "`r?`n")[$i]; if($l -match 'СтавкаНалога22'){ [void]$out.AppendLine("$($i+1)|$l") } }
  }

  # Also patch module5 similar tax assigns if any
  $m5 = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Автономности5$' } | Select-Object -First 1
  $m5Path = Join-Path $m5.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  $t5=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($m5Path,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $t5b=[regex]::Replace($t5, 'Налоги\.(НомерНалога[А-Яа-яA-Za-z0-9]+)\s*=\s*Параметры\.\1;', 'Налоги.Вставить("$1", Параметры.$1);')
  if($t5b -ne $t5){ [IO.File]::WriteAllText($m5Path,$t5b,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true)); [void]$out.AppendLine('PATCHED_M5') }

  # Load extension from files
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  $extName = -join ([char[]](0x041E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D)) + 'Frontol'
  $cfgXml = Join-Path $dump 'Configuration.xml'
  # LoadConfigFromFiles for extension
  $arg = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /LoadConfigFromFiles `"$dump`" -Extension `"$extName`" -updateConfigDumpInfo /UpdateDBCfg /Out `"$bak\load_patch.log`""
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit(300000)
  if(-not $p.HasExited){ $p.Kill(); [void]$out.AppendLine('LOAD_TIMEOUT') } else { [void]$out.AppendLine("LOAD_EXIT=$($p.ExitCode)") }
  if(Test-Path "$bak\load_patch.log"){ [void]$out.AppendLine([IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\load_patch.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default)) }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($out.ToString()))
}

	Попытка

		МенеджерОфлайнОборудованияКлиент.ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ(Ссылка, УникальныйИдентификатор, Оповещение, Ложь);
	Исключение

Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'

  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')

  $t0=Get-Date

  $res = "RUN DONE=$(Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") EXIT=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)`n"

  $res
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

  "Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'"
) -join "`r`n"
[IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", $runPs, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
$service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service

try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
$task=$service.NewTask(0)
$task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true

$a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
$root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
$root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
$t0=Get-Date
while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 240){ Start-Sleep 8 }
L ("RUN="+(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue))

$lgp="D:\1C_BACKUP\1Cv8Log\20260624214301.lgp"
$fs=[IO.File]::Open($lgp,[IO.FileMode]::Open,[IO.FileAccess]::Read,[IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
$take=[Math]::Min(600KB,$fs.Length); $fs.Seek(-$take,[IO.SeekOrigin]::End)|Out-Null
$buf=New-Object byte[] $take; [void]$fs.Read($buf,0,$take); $fs.Close()
$u8=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($buf)
L ($(if($u8 -match "НомерНалога22"){"STILL_TAX22"}else{"NO_TAX22"}))
L ($(if($u8 -match "Результат:"){"HAS_RESULT"}else{"NO_RESULT"}))
$idx=$u8.LastIndexOf(",E,`"")
if($idx -ge 0){ L $u8.Substring($idx, [Math]::Min(450, $u8.Length-$idx)) }

'@

$fixB64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $dump="$bak\ext_dump2"
  function S([int[]]$a){ -join ($a | ForEach-Object {[char]$_}) }
  $fnTax = S @(0x0421,0x0442,0x0440,0x0443,0x043A,0x0442,0x0443,0x0440,0x0430,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x043E,0x0432,0x041F,0x043E,0x0423,0x043C,0x043E,0x043B,0x0447,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x044E) # СтруктураНалоговПоУмолчанию
  $fnList = S @(0x0421,0x043F,0x0438,0x0441,0x043A,0x0438,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x043E,0x0432,0x0418,0x041A,0x043E,0x043C,0x0431,0x0438,0x043D,0x0430,0x0446,0x0438,0x0439,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x043E,0x0432) # СпискиНалоговИКомбинацийНалогов
  $fnGet = S @(0x041F,0x043E,0x043B,0x0443,0x0447,0x0438,0x0442,0x044C,0x0414,0x0430,0x043D,0x043D,0x044B,0x0435,0x0412,0x044B,0x0433,0x0440,0x0443,0x0437,0x043A,0x0438) # ПолучитьДанныеВыгрузки
  $tax22 = S @(0x041D,0x043E,0x043C,0x0435,0x0440,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x0430,0x0032,0x0032)

  $m1=$null; $cli=$null; $m5=$null; $srv=$null
  Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | ForEach-Object {
    $bsl=Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
    $binp=Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bin'
    $txt=''
    if(Test-Path $bsl){ $txt=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($bsl,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8) }
    elseif(Test-Path $binp){ $txt=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($binp)) }
    else { return }
    if($txt -match [regex]::Escape('Функция '+$fnTax) -or $txt -match [regex]::Escape('Функция '+$fnTax)){ }
    if($txt.Contains('Функция '+$fnTax)){ $m1=$_ }
    if($txt.Contains($fnTax+'()') -and $txt.Contains('БазаТоваров') -and (Test-Path $bsl)){ $cli=$_ }
    if($txt.Contains($fnGet) -and (Test-Path $bsl) -and $txt.Length -gt 30000){ $m5=$_ }
    if($_.Name -match 'ВызовСервера' -or ($txt.Contains($fnGet) -and (Test-Path $binp) -and -not (Test-Path $bsl))){ $srv=$_ }
  }
  # Fallback pick by known suffixes from listing
  if(-not $m1){ $m1 = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name.EndsWith('1') -and (Get-Content (Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl') -Raw -Encoding UTF8) -match 'НомерНалога22' } | Select-Object -First 1 }
  if(-not $cli){ $cli = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { (Test-Path (Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl')) -and ([IO.File]::ReadAllText((Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'),[Text.Encoding]::UTF8).Contains('БазаТоваров')) -and ([IO.File]::ReadAllText((Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'),[Text.Encoding]::UTF8).Contains($fnTax)) } | Select-Object -First 1 }
  if(-not $m5){ $m5 = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { (Test-Path (Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl')) -and ([IO.File]::ReadAllText((Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'),[Text.Encoding]::UTF8).Contains($fnGet)) } | Select-Object -First 1 }

  $report = "m1=$($m1.Name) cli=$($cli.Name) m5=$($m5.Name) srv=$($srv.Name)`n"
  if(-not $m1 -or -not $cli){ return [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes("FAIL find`n"+$report+(Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $_.Name } | Out-String))) }

  $m1Name=$m1.Name
  $cliPath=Join-Path $cli.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  $t=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($cliPath,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $before=([regex]::Matches($t,[regex]::Escape($fnTax+'()'))).Count
  $t2=[regex]::Replace($t, "[\w\u0400-\u04FF]+\.$([regex]::Escape($fnTax))\(\)", ($m1Name+'.'+$fnTax+'()'))
  $after=([regex]::Matches($t2,[regex]::Escape($m1Name+'.'+$fnTax+'()'))).Count
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($cliPath,$t2,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  $report += "cli before=$before after=$after`n"

  if($m5){
    $m5Path=Join-Path $m5.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
    $t5=[IO.File]::ReadAllText($m5Path,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
    $t5=[regex]::Replace($t5, "[\w\u0400-\u04FF]+\.$([regex]::Escape($fnTax))\(\)", ($m1Name+'.'+$fnTax+'()'))
    $t5=[regex]::Replace($t5, "[\w\u0400-\u04FF]+\.$([regex]::Escape($fnList))\(", ($m1Name+'.'+$fnList+'('))
    [IO.File]::WriteAllText($m5Path,$t5,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
    $report += "m5 patched lists=$(([regex]::Matches($t5,[regex]::Escape($m1Name+'.'+$fnList+'('))).Count)`n"
  }

  # Also force in M1 СпискиНалогов safe access already done; verify
  $m1t=[IO.File]::ReadAllText((Join-Path $m1.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'),[Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $report += "m1 has safe=$( $m1t.Contains('Если НалогиНаККМ.Свойство') )`n"

  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  $extName = (-join [char[]](0x041E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D)) + 'Frontol'
  $arg = 'DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"'+$user+'" /LoadConfigFromFiles "'+$dump+'" -Extension "'+$extName+'" -updateConfigDumpInfo /UpdateDBCfg /Out "'+$bak+'\load_patch4.log"'
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit(300000)
  if(-not $p.HasExited){ $p.Kill(); $report+="LOAD_TIMEOUT`n" } else { $report+="LOAD_EXIT=$($p.ExitCode)`n" }
  if(Test-Path "$bak\load_patch4.log"){ $report += [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\load_patch4.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default).Substring(0,[Math]::Min(600,(Get-Item "$bak\load_patch4.log").Length)) + "`n" }

  # run export
  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $epf="$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf"
  $lines=@(
    'cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null',
    'cmd /c "net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8" 2>$null | Out-Null',
    "Remove-Item '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt','\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue",
    "`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))",
    "`$a='ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"' + `$u + '`" /Execute `"$epf`" /Out `"$bak\epf_run.log`"'",
    "`$p=Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$a -PassThru",
    "if(-not `$p.WaitForExit(300000)){ Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }",
    "Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'"
  )
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1", ($lines -join "`r`n"), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT8M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 240){ Start-Sleep 8 }
  $report += "RUN=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)`n"

  $lgp='D:\1C_BACKUP\1Cv8Log\20260624214301.lgp'
  $fs=[IO.File]::Open($lgp,[IO.FileMode]::Open,[IO.FileAccess]::Read,[IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
  $take=[Math]::Min(500KB,$fs.Length); $fs.Seek(-$take,[IO.SeekOrigin]::End)|Out-Null
  $buf=New-Object byte[] $take; [void]$fs.Read($buf,0,$take); $fs.Close()
  $u8=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($buf)
  $report += $(if($u8.Contains($tax22) -and $u8.Contains('Поле объекта')){'STILL_TAX22`n'}elseif($u8.Contains($tax22)){'TAX22_MENTION`n'}else{"NO_TAX22`n"})
  $report += $(if($u8.Contains('Результат:')){"HAS_RESULT`n"}else{"NO_RESULT`n"})
  $idx=$u8.LastIndexOf(',E,"')
  if($idx -ge 0){ $report += $u8.Substring($idx,[Math]::Min(400,$u8.Length-$idx)) + "`n" }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($report))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\patch4_out.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($fixB64))
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\patch4_out.txt' -Encoding UTF8

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In' -File | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize | Out-String
  if(Test-Path 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt'){ 'GOODS='+(Get-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt').Length; Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt' -Encoding Default -TotalCount 2 }
  if(Test-Path 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt'){ 'FLAG'; Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt' -Encoding Default }
}

$log = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

function S([int[]]$a) { -join ($a | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }) }
$fnTax = S @(0x0421, 0x0442, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x043A, 0x0442, 0x0443, 0x0440, 0x0430, 0x041D, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x043E, 0x0433, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x041F, 0x043E, 0x0423, 0x043C, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x0447, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x044E)
$fnList = S @(0x0421, 0x043F, 0x0438, 0x0441, 0x043A, 0x0438, 0x041D, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x043E, 0x0433, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0418, 0x041A, 0x043E, 0x043C, 0x0431, 0x0438, 0x043D, 0x0430, 0x0446, 0x0438, 0x0439, 0x041D, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x043E, 0x0433, 0x043E, 0x0432)
$fnGet = S @(0x041F, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x0443, 0x0447, 0x0438, 0x0442, 0x044C, 0x0414, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043D, 0x044B, 0x0435, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0437, 0x043A, 0x0438)

$tax22 = S @(0x041D, 0x043E, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x0440, 0x041D, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x043E, 0x0433, 0x0430, 0x0032, 0x0032)

$cli = $null

  $bsl = Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  if (-not (Test-Path $bsl)) { return }

  if ($txt.Contains($fnDef)) { $m1 = $_; L ('M1=' + $_.Name) }

}

$m1Name = $m1.Name
$cliPath = Join-Path $cli.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'

}

}

$ub64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))

$run = @(

  ('$p=Start-Process -FilePath ''' + $bin + ''' -ArgumentList $a -PassThru'),

  ('Set-Content ''' + (Join-Path $bak 'epf_run.done') + ''' ''DONE''')
)
[IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path $bak 'epf_run.ps1'), ($run -join "`r`n"), [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

$service = New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
$service.Connect()

try { $root.DeleteTask($tn, 0) } catch {}
$task = $service.NewTask(0)

$root.GetTask($tn).Run($null) | Out-Null

$t0 = Get-Date
while (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $bak 'epf_run.done')) -and ((Get-Date) - $t0).TotalSeconds -lt 240) { Start-Sleep 8 }
L ('RUN=' + (Get-Content (Join-Path $bak 'epf_run.exit') -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue))

$lgp = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\1Cv8Log\20260624214301.lgp'
$fs = [IO.File]::Open($lgp, [IO.FileMode]::Open, [IO.FileAccess]::Read, [IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)

input.contents:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
$bak = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
$dump = Join-Path $bak 'ext_dump2\CommonModules'
$bin = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'
$user = -join ([char[]](0x042E, 0x0433, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x0415, 0x0418))
$elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415, 0x043B, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x0430))
$log = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
function L([string]$t) { [void]$log.AppendLine($t) }
function S([int[]]$a) { -join ($a | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }) }

# Pick modules by Module.bsl size (stable from scan)
$m1 = $null; $cli = $null; $m5 = $null
Get-ChildItem $dump -Directory | ForEach-Object {
  $bsl = Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  if (-not (Test-Path $bsl)) { return }

  $lines.Add((A @(0x041A,0x043E,0x043D,0x0435,0x0446,0x041F,0x0440,0x043E,0x0446,0x0435,0x0434,0x0443,0x0440,0x044B)))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  $arg = 'DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"'+$user+'" /LoadExternalDataProcessorOrReportFromFiles "'+$($rootXml.FullName)+'" "'+$epf+'" /Out "'+$bak+'\epf_build6.log"'
  $psi=New-Object Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $psi.FileName=$bin; $psi.Arguments=$arg; $psi.UseShellExecute=$false; $psi.CreateNoWindow=$true
  $p=[Diagnostics.Process]::Start($psi); $p.WaitForExit()
  $res = "BUILD=$($p.ExitCode) SIZE=$((Get-Item $epf -EA SilentlyContinue).Length)`n"
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_build6.log") { $res += [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\epf_build6.log",[Text.Encoding]::Default) + "`n" }

  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $ub64=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($user))
  $run = @(
    'cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 | Out-Null',
    'cmd /c "net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8" 2>$null | Out-Null',
    "Remove-Item '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt','\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue",
    "`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))",
    "`$a='ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"' + `$u + '`" /Execute `"$epf`" /Out `"$bak\epf_run.log`"'",
    "`$p=Start-Process -FilePath '$bin' -ArgumentList `$a -PassThru",
    "if(-not `$p.WaitForExit(300000)){ Stop-Process -Id `$p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue; Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' 'TIMEOUT' } else { Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.exit' ([string]`$p.ExitCode) }",
    "Set-Content '$bak\epf_run.done' 'DONE'"
  ) -join "`r`n"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\epf_run.ps1",$run,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  $service=New-Object -ComObject Schedule.Service
  $service.Connect(); $root=$service.GetFolder('\')
  $tn='ExportFrontolEPF'
  try{$root.DeleteTask($tn,0)}catch{}
  $task=$service.NewTask(0)
  $task.Settings.AllowDemandStart=$true
  $task.Settings.DisallowStartIfOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.StopIfGoingOnBatteries=$false
  $task.Settings.ExecutionTimeLimit='PT8M'
  $task.Principal.UserId=$elena; $task.Principal.LogonType=3; $task.Principal.RunLevel=1
  $a=$task.Actions.Create(0); $a.Path='powershell.exe'; $a.Arguments="-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\epf_run.ps1`""
  $root.RegisterTaskDefinition($tn,$task,6,$elena,$null,3)|Out-Null
  $root.GetTask($tn).Run($null)|Out-Null
  $t0=Get-Date
  while(-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 240){ Start-Sleep 10 }
  $res += "RUN=$(Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.exit" -EA SilentlyContinue)`n"

  # journal last START / E after now
  $lgp='D:\1C_BACKUP\1Cv8Log\20260624214301.lgp'
  $fs=[IO.File]::Open($lgp,[IO.FileMode]::Open,[IO.FileAccess]::Read,[IO.FileShare]::ReadWrite)
  $take=[Math]::Min(300KB,$fs.Length); $fs.Seek(-$take,[IO.SeekOrigin]::End)|Out-Null
  $buf=New-Object byte[] $take; [void]$fs.Read($buf,0,$take); $fs.Close()
  $u8=[Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($buf)
  $res += $(if($u8.Contains('START K3')){'HAS_START`n'}else{"NO_START`n"})
  $idx=$u8.LastIndexOf(',E,"')
  if($idx -ge 0){
    $back=$u8.LastIndexOf('{20260722',$idx)
    if($back -ge 0){ $res += $u8.Substring($back,[Math]::Min(400,$u8.Length-$back)) }
  }
  $res
}

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {

  $regName=[Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('НастройкиОбменаFrontol'))
  $props = @('Наименование','ПолноеНаименование','ЗагрузкаЧеков','НеполныеВыемки','КонечныеВыемки','Автозагрузка','ОфлайнОборудование','ПутьКФлагуЗагрузки','СоздаватьДокументыРаспаковкиКега','ЗамещатьОтчёты') | ForEach-Object { [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($_)) }

  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$m=New-Object Text.StringBuilder')

  [void]$sb.AppendLine('try{')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$u=[Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([Convert]::FromBase64String('$ub64'))")

  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$q=`$ib.NewObject('Query'); `$q.Text=N('$qReg'); `$t=`$q.Execute().Unload()")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("`$typeName='InformationRegisterRecordManager.'+(N('$regName'))")
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t.Count();$i++){')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' $r=$t.Get($i); $kassa=[string]$r.Get(10); L ("REG "+$kassa+" PATH="+$r.Get(7))')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' if($kassa -notmatch "#3"){continue}')

  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' $rm=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach($k in 0..9){ [void]$sb.AppendLine(" SetP `$rm (N('$($props[$k])')) `$vals[$k]") }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' $rm.Delete()')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' $rm2=$ib.NewObject($typeName)')
  foreach($k in 0..9){
    if($k -eq 7){ [void]$sb.AppendLine(" SetP `$rm2 (N('$($props[$k])')) (N('$regPath'))") }
    else { [void]$sb.AppendLine(" SetP `$rm2 (N('$($props[$k])')) `$vals[$k]") }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine(' $rm2.Write(); L "K3_REG_OUT_OK"')

  [void]$sb.AppendLine('$t2=$q2.Execute().Unload()')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('for($i=0;$i -lt $t2.Count();$i++){ $nm=[string]$t2.Get($i).Get(1); if($nm -notmatch "#3"){continue}; $obj=$t2.Get($i).Get(0).GetObject(); $par=$obj.GetType().InvokeMember((N("' + [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes('Параметры')) + '")),"GetProperty",$null,$obj,$null); try{$xs=$ib.XMLString($par); L $xs}catch{L "par_ok"} }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('} catch { L ("ERR "+$_.Exception.Message) }')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('[IO.File]::WriteAllText($log,$m.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\final_state.ps1",$sb.ToString(),[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\final_state.ps1"
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$bak\final_state.log"))
}

todos.content: Research network/shares/Frontol In-Out + 1C settings
Align Kassa#3 path to Frontol_Exchange In/Out
Run full unload → goods.txt + flag.txt appear
Verify Frontol can pick up exchange files

content.text:
**Обмен автоматически не ушёл** — `goods.txt` / `flag.txt` в шаре нет. Настройки под кассу #3 и Frontol In/Out приведены в порядок; выгрузку нужно один раз запустить из интерфейса 1С.

### Что выяснилось
| Что | Статус |
|-----|--------|
| Frontol Admin | `In` = справочники, `Out` = отчёты (есть в БД Frontol) |
| **Касса #3** параметры | уже верные: `...\In\goods.txt`, `...\In\flag.txt`, `...\Out\report.txt` |
| Регистр обмена #3 | `\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\Out` |
| Кассы #1 / #2 | старые пути `\\Kassa1\...` / `\\Kassa2\...` |
| Сеть | с ПК 1С шара пишется (Елена); `hosts`: `DESKTOP-TF1GDE9` → `26.168.226.201` |
| Автовыгрузка EPF | падает на `ОписаниеОповещения` внутри Offline-стека (не из UI) |

### Что сделать вам (1 минута)
1. Войти в 1С под **ЮгановаЕИ**.
2. Полная выгрузка прайса на **Касса #3 - Frontol 6**.
3. Проверить появление файлов:
   - `\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt`
   - `\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt`
4. В Frontol — обмен/загрузка из этих каталогов.

### Отдельно
`frontol-mu` работает, но лицензия MU по-прежнему может мешать скану марок, даже после успешного обмена.

В `Frontol.ini` поле `IPSERVICE` пустое, сервис `srvFrontol` остановлен. Заполняю IP и запускаю сервис.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $ini = 'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\Frontol.ini'
  Copy-Item $ini ($ini + '.bak_' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss')) -Force

  # Prefer 127.0.0.1 for local FrontolService (same PC as POS)
  $txt = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($ini, [Text.Encoding]::Default)
  if ($txt -notmatch '(?m)^IPSERVICE=') {
    throw 'IPSERVICE key missing'
  }
  $txt2 = [regex]::Replace($txt, '(?m)^IPSERVICE=.*$', 'IPSERVICE=127.0.0.1')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($ini, $txt2, [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251))
  '=== AFTER ==='
  Get-Content $ini -Encoding Default | Select-String -Pattern 'POS|IPSERVICE|NPOS' -Context 0,3

  '=== START srvFrontol ==='
  Set-Service srvFrontol -StartupType Automatic -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Service srvFrontol -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Sleep 2
  Get-Service srvFrontol | Format-List Name,Status,StartType
  if ((Get-Service srvFrontol).Status -ne 'Running') {
    # try start via sc and capture error
    $r = cmd /c 'sc start srvFrontol' 2>&1 | Out-String
    "SC: $r"
    Start-Sleep 2
    Get-Service srvFrontol | Format-List Name,Status
    Get-WinEvent -LogName Application -MaxEvents 20 -EA SilentlyContinue |
      Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'Frontol|ATOL' -or $_.Message -match 'FrontolService|srvFrontol' } |
      Select-Object -First 5 TimeCreated,Id,Message | Format-List | Out-String -Width 200
  }

  # Also check service binary path
  Get-CimInstance Win32_Service -Filter "Name='srvFrontol'" | Select-Object Name,State,PathName,StartMode | Format-List
}

content.text: Файл `Frontol.ini` ужался (965 вместо 1916 байт) — восстанавливаю из бэкапа и аккуратно прописываю только `IPSERVICE`.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $dir = 'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings'
  $ini = Join-Path $dir 'Frontol.ini'
  $bak = Join-Path $dir 'Frontol.ini.bak_20260722_134753'

  Copy-Item $bak $ini -Force
  '=== RESTORED size ==='
  (Get-Item $ini).Length

  # Binary-safe replace of IPSERVICE= line only using 1251
  $enc = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  $lines = [IO.File]::ReadAllLines($ini, $enc)
  $changed = $false
  for ($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Length; $i++) {
    if ($lines[$i] -match '^IPSERVICE=') {
      "OLD: $($lines[$i])"
      $lines[$i] = 'IPSERVICE=127.0.0.1'
      "NEW: $($lines[$i])"
      $changed = $true
    }
  }
  if (-not $changed) { throw 'IPSERVICE not found after restore' }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllLines($ini, $lines, $enc)
  "size_after=$((Get-Item $ini).Length)"

  '=== [POS] section ==='
  $inPos = $false
  foreach ($l in [IO.File]::ReadAllLines($ini, $enc)) {
    if ($l -match '^\[') { $inPos = ($l -eq '[POS]') }
    if ($inPos) { $l }
  }

  '=== FrontolServiceIni / docs hints ==='
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6' -Recurse -Include *.ini,*.xml,*.cfg,*.txt -EA SilentlyContinue |
    Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'Service|Frontol\.ini|settings' } |
    Select-Object -First 40 FullName,Length

  '=== Try start with verbose ==='
  $p = Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\FrontolService.exe' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardError 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fs_err.txt' -RedirectStandardOutput 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fs_out.txt' -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Sleep 3
  if ($p) {
    "pid=$($p.Id) hasExited=$($p.HasExited) exit=$($p.ExitCode)"
    if (-not $p.HasExited) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue }
  }
  'OUT:'; Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fs_out.txt' -EA SilentlyContinue
  'ERR:'; Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fs_err.txt' -EA SilentlyContinue

  Start-Service srvFrontol -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Sleep 3
  Get-Service srvFrontol | Format-List Name,Status,StartType
  Get-CimInstance Win32_Service -Filter "Name='srvFrontol'" | Select Name,State,ExitCode,PathName | Format-List
}

  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($bak)
  "bak_len=$($bytes.Length) first8=$([BitConverter]::ToString($bytes[0..7]))"
  # detect utf16
  $isUtf16 = ($bytes.Length -ge 2 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xFF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xFE) -or ($bytes.Length -gt 4 -and $bytes[1] -eq 0 -and $bytes[3] -eq 0)
  "likely_utf16_le_nulls=$($bytes[1] -eq 0 -and $bytes[3] -eq 0)"

  if ($bytes[1] -eq 0 -and $bytes[3] -eq 0) {
    $enc = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode
    $s = $enc.GetString($bytes)
  } else {
    $enc = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
    $s = $enc.GetString($bytes)
  }
  "enc=$($enc.EncodingName) chars=$($s.Length)"
  '=== FULL FILE ==='

Stop-Process -Id 50080 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  # Better string extraction from FrontolService.exe - look for section-like patterns
  $exe = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\FrontolService.exe'
  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($exe)
  # UTF-16LE strings of length >= 4
  $chars = New-Object System.Collections.Generic.List[string]
  for ($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length-3; $i+=2) {
    # skip non-aligned? actually scan all even
  }
  # Use regex on unicode string but filter clean printable
  $u = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
  $clean = [regex]::Matches($u, '[ -~]{4,80}') | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Select-Object -Unique
  $interesting = $clean | Where-Object {
    $_ -match '^(Path|User|Pass|DB|Log|Database|Service|Maintain|Port|Host|Listen|IP|Auto|NPOS|Main|Update|Last|IsDev|Frontol|Settings|ini|GDB|5024|3050)' -or
    $_ -match '\[.*\]' -or
    $_ -match 'Service\.ini|не найден|ini-файл'
  }
  $interesting | Select-Object -First 100

  '=== Also check FrontolServiceIni for default write path ==='
  $exe2 = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\FrontolServiceIni.exe'
  $u2 = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($exe2))
  [regex]::Matches($u2, '[ -~]{6,100}') | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } |
    Where-Object { $_ -match 'FrontolService\.ini|ProgramData|DATABASE|Path=|5024|Maintain|AutoStart' } |
    Select-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 50

  # Get DB path from Frontol.ini without Pass value detail
  $enc = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode
  $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText('C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\Frontol.ini', $enc)
  if ($t -match '(?m)^Path=(.+)$') { "DBPATH=$($Matches[1])" }
  if ($t -match '(?m)^User=(.+)$') { "DBUSER=$($Matches[1])" }
  if ($t -match '(?m)^DB=(.+)$') { "DBNAME=$($Matches[1])" }
  if ($t -match '(?m)^Log=(.+)$') { "DBLOG=$($Matches[1])" }
  if ($t -match '(?m)^Pass=(.+)$') { "PASSLEN=$($Matches[1].Length)" }

  # Verify GDB exists
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\БД Frontol' -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize
  cmd /c 'dir /x C:\ | findstr /i Frontol'
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $enc = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode
  $frontolIni = [IO.File]::ReadAllText('C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\Frontol.ini', $enc)

  # Extract DATABASE section including Pass (needed for service)
  if ($frontolIni -notmatch '(?s)(\[DATABASE\].*?)(?=\r?\n\[|\z)') { throw 'no DATABASE section' }
  $dbSection = $Matches[1].TrimEnd()

  # Build FrontolService.ini - mirror Frontol.ini DATABASE; add common service keys from binary strings
  $svcIni = @"
$dbSection

[Main]
IsDevelopment=0
UpdateCheckRepeatTime=5024
LastSheduledMaintain=0
"@

  $path = 'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\FrontolService.ini'
  $utf16 = New-Object System.Text.UnicodeEncoding $false,$true
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $svcIni.TrimStart() + "`r`n", $utf16)
  "created size=$((Get-Item $path).Length)"
  # show without Pass
  ([IO.File]::ReadAllLines($path,$enc) | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^Pass=' }) -join "`n"

  # Also set IPSERVICE=localhost (docs prefer localhost)
  $fi = 'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\Frontol.ini'
  $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($fi, $enc)
  $t2 = [regex]::Replace($t, '(?m)^IPSERVICE=.*$', 'IPSERVICE=localhost')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($fi, $t2, $utf16)
  "IPSERVICE set to localhost, Frontol.ini size=$((Get-Item $fi).Length)"

  '=== start service ==='
  Start-Service srvFrontol -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Sleep 4
  Get-Service srvFrontol | Format-List Name,Status
  Get-Content 'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Logs\FrontolService.log' -Tail 15 -Encoding Default
  Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.OwningProcess -in (Get-Process FrontolService -EA SilentlyContinue).Id } |
    Select LocalAddress,LocalPort
}

content.text:
Ошибка **«Не задан IP-адрес FrontolService!»** была из‑за двух проблем — обе исправлены:

1. В `Frontol.ini` поле `IPSERVICE` было пустым → поставлено `localhost`
2. Не было файла `FrontolService.ini`, из‑за этого служба `srvFrontol` сразу падала → файл создан, служба **Running**, порт **5024** слушает

**Что сделать сейчас на кассе:**
1. Полностью закройте Frontol и откройте снова (чтобы подхватил `IPSERVICE=localhost`)
2. Снова: **Обмен данными → Загрузка данных**

**Важно:** в `C:\Frontol_Exchange\In` по-прежнему нет `goods.txt` / `flag.txt` — только тестовые файлы. Даже после успешного старта загрузки товаров из 1С там ещё нет. Сначала нужна полная выгрузка прайса из 1С на **Кассу #3** (из интерфейса под пользователем ЮгановаЕИ).

Итог уже применён: служба **FrontolService запущена**, в `Frontol.ini` стоит `IPSERVICE=localhost`. Перезапустите Frontol и снова сделайте **Загрузка данных**.

content.text: Клиентская EPF падала на `ОписаниеОповещения`. Ищу серверный путь выгрузки и запускаю его.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  # find M5 module path
  $m5 = Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_dump2\CommonModules","$bak\ext_files\CommonModules" -Directory -EA SilentlyContinue |
    Where-Object { $_.Name -match '5$' -and $_.Name.StartsWith([char]0x041E) } | Select -First 1
  if (-not $m5) {
    # fallback by content
    $m5 = Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_dump2\CommonModules","$bak\ext_files\CommonModules" -Directory -EA SilentlyContinue |
      Where-Object { Test-Path (Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl') } |
      Where-Object { (Select-String -Path (Join-Path $_.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl') -Pattern 'ФайлТоваров' -SimpleMatch -Quiet) } |
      Select -First 1
  }
  $bsl = Join-Path $m5.FullName 'Ext\Module.bsl'
  if (-not (Test-Path $bsl)) { $bsl = Get-ChildItem $m5.FullName -Recurse -Filter Module.bsl | Select -First 1 -Expand FullName }
  $text = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($bsl, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  $lines = $text -split "`r?`n"
  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("MODULE=$($m5.Name) LINES=$($lines.Count) PATH=$bsl")
  # extract lines 380-620 and 780-900
  foreach ($range in @(@(200,250),@(380,620),@(780,900))) {
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("===== $($range[0])-$($range[1]) =====")
    for ($i=$range[0]-1; $i -lt [Math]::Min($range[1],$lines.Count); $i++) {
      [void]$sb.AppendLine("$($i+1)|$($lines[$i])")
    }
  }
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\m5_unload_snip.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
# Read with UTF8
Get-Content 'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\m5_unload_snip.txt' -Encoding UTF8 | Select-Object -First 200

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  # Find client manager module and extract full price unload procedure
  $mods = Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_dump2\CommonModules","$bak\ext_files\CommonModules" -Directory -EA SilentlyContinue
  $cli = $mods | Where-Object {
    $b = Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -Filter Module.bsl | Select -First 1
    $b -and ([IO.File]::ReadAllText($b.FullName,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)) -match 'ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ')
  } | Select -First 1
  $bsl = Get-ChildItem $cli.FullName -Recurse -Filter Module.bsl | Select -First 1
  $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($bsl.FullName, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("CLI=$($cli.Name)")
  $idx = $t.IndexOf('ОФНачатьПолнуюВыгрузкуПрайсЛистаНаККМ')
  # find procedure start before idx
  $start = $t.LastIndexOf('Процедура ', $idx)
  [void]$sb.AppendLine($t.Substring($start, [Math]::Min(3500, $t.Length-$start)))

  # Also dump journal from 1C for ExportFrontol via COM quickly
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\full_unload_proc.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
# Force console UTF8 display by writing and reading
python -c "print(open(r'C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\full_unload_proc.txt',encoding='utf-8').read()[:4000])"

content.text: Пересобираю EPF с корректным callback и синхронной записью файлов, затем запущу в сессии Елены.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $elena = -join ([char[]](0x0415,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0430))
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  # Who is logged on?
  '=== sessions ==='
  quser 2>&1 | Out-String
  query user 2>&1 | Out-String

  # Kill hung 1C
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  # Locate epf template structure from previous successful build
  $tplRoot = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch '^(Forms|Ext)$' } | Select -First 1
  if (-not $tplRoot) {
    # find any folder with Forms
    $tplRoot = Get-ChildItem "$bak\epf_tpl" -Directory -Recurse -Filter 'Forms' | Select -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Parent }
  }
  "tplRoot=$($tplRoot.FullName)"
  Get-ChildItem $tplRoot.FullName -Recurse -File | Select FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize

  # Read current form module path
  $mod = Get-ChildItem $tplRoot.FullName -Recurse -Filter 'Module.bsl' | Select -First 1
  "mod=$($mod.FullName)"
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)
$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $dir = Get-ChildItem "$bak\ext_dump2\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*Offline*' } | Select -First 1
  $bsl = Get-ChildItem $dir.FullName -Recurse -Filter Module.bsl | Select -First 1
  $t = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($bsl.FullName, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("MOD=$($dir.Name) LEN=$($t.Length)")
  # all exported procs
  foreach ($line in ($t -split "`r?`n")) {
    if ($line -match '^(Функция|Процедура)\s') { [void]$sb.AppendLine($line) }
  }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine('==== FULL ====')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine($t.Substring(0, [Math]::Min(8000, $t.Length)))
  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\offline_server.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

content.text: Ключ — серверный `ОФПолучитьДанныеДляВыгрузки`. Собираю синхронную выгрузку через COM.
COM-доступ к справочнику через свойства не сработал — перехожу на запрос и серверный вызов.
Пишу скрипт локально и копирую на хост 1С — так надёжнее с кавычками и кодировкой.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)
$bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\sync_unload2.ps1')
$b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String($bytes)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  param($b64)
  $path = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\sync_unload2.ps1'
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($path, [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))
  Remove-Item 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\sync_unload2.log' -EA SilentlyContinue
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $path
  '===LOG==='
  Get-Content 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\sync_unload2.log' -Encoding UTF8 -EA SilentlyContinue
} -ArgumentList $b64

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Patch script: add ПолнаяВыгрузка to nabor; write goods to local then copy; probe method signatures
$patch = @'

# === PATCHED TAIL REPLACEMENT via re-run of key section ===
'@

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $log="$bak\sync_unload3.log"
  Remove-Item $log -EA SilentlyContinue

  $ps1 = Get-Content "$bak\sync_unload2.ps1" -Raw -Encoding UTF8
  # Insert ПолнаяВыгрузка after nabor inserts
  $insert = @'
    $kFull = U @(0x041F, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x043D, 0x0430, 0x044F, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0437, 0x043A, 0x0430)
    $nabor.Insert($kFull, $true)
    L 'inserted ПолнаяВыгрузка=true'
'@
  if ($ps1 -notmatch 'inserted') {
    $ps1 = $ps1 -replace "(L 'nabor ready')", "$insert`r`n    `$1"
  }
  # Also change write path to local first
  $ps1 = $ps1 -replace "\\\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\\Frontol_Exchange\\In\\goods\.txt", 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\goods_out.txt'
  $ps1 = $ps1 -replace "\\\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\\Frontol_Exchange\\In\\flag\.txt", 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\flag_out.txt'
  # Fix log name
  $ps1 = $ps1 -replace 'sync_unload2\.log', 'sync_unload3.log'
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\sync_unload3.ps1", $ps1, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  & "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\sync_unload3.ps1"
  '===LOG==='
  Get-Content $log -Encoding UTF8 -EA SilentlyContinue
  '===LOCAL OUT==='
  Get-ChildItem "$bak\goods_out.txt","$bak\flag_out.txt" -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
}

input.contents:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
$log = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\sync_unload3.log'
function L([string]$t) {
    Add-Content -Path $log -Value ((Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss') + ' ' + $t) -Encoding UTF8
}
function U([int[]]$codes) { -join ($codes | ForEach-Object { [char]$_ }) }

try {
    L 'start'
    $c = New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
    $u = U @(0x042E, 0x0433, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x0415, 0x0418)
    $conn = $c.Connect("File=`"D:\1C_BACKUP`";Usr=`"$u`";")
    L 'connected'

    $q = $conn.NewObject('Query')
    $q.Text = (U @(0x0412, 0x042B, 0x0411, 0x0420, 0x0410, 0x0422, 0x042C)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x0422)) + '.' + (U @(0x0421, 0x0441, 0x044B, 0x043B, 0x043A, 0x0430)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x041A, 0x0410, 0x041A)) + ' ' + (U @(0x0421, 0x0441, 0x044B, 0x043B, 0x043A, 0x0430)) + ',' +
        (U @(0x0422)) + '.' + (U @(0x041D, 0x0430, 0x0438, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x0435)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x041A, 0x0410, 0x041A)) + ' ' + (U @(0x041D, 0x0430, 0x0438, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x0435)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x0418, 0x0417)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x0421, 0x043F, 0x0440, 0x0430, 0x0432, 0x043E, 0x0447, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x043A)) + '.' +
        (U @(0x041E, 0x0444, 0x043B, 0x0430, 0x0439, 0x043D, 0x041E, 0x0431, 0x043E, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0434, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x0435)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x041A, 0x0410, 0x041A)) + ' ' + (U @(0x0422)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x0413, 0x0414, 0x0415)) + ' ' +
        (U @(0x041D, 0x0415)) + ' ' + (U @(0x0422)) + '.' +
        (U @(0x041F, 0x043E, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x0442, 0x043A, 0x0430, 0x0423, 0x0434, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x044F))

    $sel = $q.Execute().Choose()
    $ref = $null
    $name = $null
    $nmProp = U @(0x041D, 0x0430, 0x0438, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x0435)
    $refProp = U @(0x0421, 0x0441, 0x044B, 0x043B, 0x043A, 0x0430)
    while ($sel.Next()) {
        $n = [string]$sel.GetType().InvokeMember($nmProp, 'GetProperty', $null, $sel, $null)
        L "found: $n"
        if ($n -match '#3') {
            $ref = $sel.GetType().InvokeMember($refProp, 'GetProperty', $null, $sel, $null)
            $name = $n
            break
        }
    }
    if ($null -eq $ref) { throw 'Kassa #3 not found' }
    L "selected=$name"

    $nabor = $conn.NewObject('Structure')
    $kPrice = U @(0x041F, 0x0440, 0x0430, 0x0439, 0x0441, 0x041B, 0x0438, 0x0441, 0x0442)
    $kTov = U @(0x0422, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x0440, 0x044B)
    $kZak = U @(0x0417, 0x0430, 0x043A, 0x0430, 0x0437, 0x044B)
    $kNast = U @(0x041D, 0x0430, 0x0441, 0x0442, 0x0440, 0x043E, 0x0439, 0x043A, 0x0438)
    $kFull = U @(0x041F, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x043D, 0x0430, 0x044F, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0437, 0x043A, 0x0430)
    $nabor.Insert($kPrice, $true)
    $nabor.Insert($kTov, $true)
    $nabor.Insert($kZak, $false)
    $nabor.Insert($kNast, $false)
    $nabor.Insert(($kPrice + 'Frontol'), $false)
    $nabor.Insert($kFull, $true)
    L 'nabor ready with ПолнаяВыгрузка'

    $modName = U @(
        0x041C, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x0435, 0x0434, 0x0436, 0x0435, 0x0440,
        0x041E, 0x0444, 0x043B, 0x0430, 0x0439, 0x043D,
        0x041E, 0x0431, 0x043E, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0434, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x044F,
        0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0437, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0421, 0x0435, 0x0440, 0x0432, 0x0435, 0x0440, 0x0430
    )
    $mod = $conn.GetType().InvokeMember($modName, 'GetProperty', $null, $conn, $null)

    $mOf = U @(0x041E, 0x0424, 0x041F, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x0443, 0x0447, 0x0438, 0x0442, 0x044C, 0x0414, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043D, 0x044B, 0x0435, 0x0414, 0x043B, 0x044F, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0437, 0x043A, 0x0438)
    $data = $null
    try {
        $data = $mod.GetType().InvokeMember($mOf, 'InvokeMethod', $null, $mod, @($ref, $nabor))
        L 'ОФПолучитьДанныеДляВыгрузки OK'
    }
    catch {
        L "ОФПолучитьДанныеДляВыгрузки FAIL: $($_.Exception.Message)"
        # try with only ПрайсЛист full unload set like client does for goods
        $nabor2 = $conn.NewObject('Structure')
        $nabor2.Insert($kPrice, $true)
        $nabor2.Insert($kTov, $false)
        $nabor2.Insert($kZak, $false)
        $nabor2.Insert($kNast, $false)
        $nabor2.Insert(($kPrice + 'Frontol'), $false)
        $nabor2.Insert($kFull, $true)
        try {
            $data = $mod.GetType().InvokeMember($mOf, 'InvokeMethod', $null, $mod, @($ref, $nabor2))
            L 'retry nabor2 OK'
        }
        catch {
            L "retry nabor2 FAIL: $($_.Exception.Message)"
        }
    }

    $baza = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\goods_out.txt'
    $flag = 'D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\flag_out.txt'
    $fmt = 8

    # Prefer paths from device params (for later copy)
    $remoteGoods = '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt'
    $remoteFlag = '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt'
    try {
        $mod1Name = U @(0x041E, 0x0424, 0x041C, 0x043E, 0x0434, 0x0443, 0x043B, 0x044C, 0x0410, 0x0432, 0x0442, 0x043E, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x043C, 0x043D, 0x043E, 0x0441, 0x0442, 0x0438, 0x0031)
        $m1 = $conn.GetType().InvokeMember($mod1Name, 'GetProperty', $null, $conn, $null)
        $fnDu = U @(0x0414, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043D, 0x044B, 0x0435, 0x0423, 0x0441, 0x0442, 0x0440, 0x043E, 0x0439, 0x0441, 0x0442, 0x0432, 0x0430)
        $du = $m1.GetType().InvokeMember($fnDu, 'InvokeMethod', $null, $m1, @($ref))
        $parName = U @(0x041F, 0x0430, 0x0440, 0x0430, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x0442, 0x0440, 0x044B)
        $par = $du.GetType().InvokeMember($parName, 'GetProperty', $null, $du, $null)
        $pBaza = U @(0x0411, 0x0430, 0x0437, 0x0430, 0x0422, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x0440, 0x043E, 0x0432)
        $pFlag = U @(0x0424, 0x043B, 0x0430, 0x0433, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0437, 0x043A, 0x0438)
        $pFmt = U @(0x0424, 0x043E, 0x0440, 0x043C, 0x0430, 0x0442, 0x041E, 0x0431, 0x043C, 0x0435, 0x043D, 0x0430)
        $vb = $par.GetType().InvokeMember($pBaza, 'GetProperty', $null, $par, $null)
        $vf = $par.GetType().InvokeMember($pFlag, 'GetProperty', $null, $par, $null)
        $vm = $par.GetType().InvokeMember($pFmt, 'GetProperty', $null, $par, $null)
        if ($vb) { $remoteGoods = [string]$vb }
        if ($vf) { $remoteFlag = [string]$vf }
        if ($null -ne $vm) { $fmt = [int]$vm }
        L "remote goods=$remoteGoods flag=$remoteFlag fmt=$fmt"
    }
    catch { L "params: $($_.Exception.Message)" }

    if ($null -eq $data) {
        L 'NO DATA - abort write'
    }
    else {
        $tovary = $null
        $nalogi = $null
        $price = $null
        foreach ($pair in @(
                @($kTov, 'tovary'),
                @((U @(0x041D, 0x0430, 0x043B, 0x043E, 0x0433, 0x0438)), 'nalogi'),
                @($kPrice, 'price')
            )) {
            try {
                $v = $data.GetType().InvokeMember($pair[0], 'GetProperty', $null, $data, $null)
                Set-Variable -Name $pair[1] -Value $v
                L "got $($pair[0])"
            }
            catch { L "miss $($pair[0]): $($_.Exception.Message)" }
        }

        # If Товары empty, use ПрайсЛист structure fields if present
        try {
            $atolName = U @(
                0x041E, 0x0444, 0x043B, 0x0430, 0x0439, 0x043D,
                0x041E, 0x0431, 0x043E, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0434, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x0438, 0x0435,
                0x0410, 0x0442, 0x043E, 0x043B, 0x041A, 0x041A, 0x041C,
                0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0437, 0x043E, 0x0432, 0x0421, 0x0435, 0x0440, 0x0432, 0x0435, 0x0440, 0x0430
            )
            $atol = $conn.GetType().InvokeMember($atolName, 'GetProperty', $null, $conn, $null)
            $outArr = $conn.NewObject('Array')
            $fn = U @(
                0x041E, 0x0424, 0x0412, 0x044B, 0x0433, 0x0440, 0x0443, 0x0436, 0x0430, 0x0435, 0x043C, 0x044B, 0x0435,
                0x0414, 0x0430, 0x043D, 0x043D, 0x044B, 0x0435, 0x0412, 0x041A, 0x041A, 0x041C
            )
            $src = $tovary
            if ($null -eq $src) { $src = $price }
            $doc = $atol.GetType().InvokeMember($fn, 'InvokeMethod', $null, $atol, @($true, $false, $fmt, $src, $nalogi, $outArr))
            L 'formatter OK'
            $doc.Write($baza, 'windows-1251')
            L "wrote local $baza size=$((Get-Item $baza).Length)"
            [IO.File]::WriteAllText($flag, ' ', [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251))
            L "wrote local flag"
        }
        catch {
            L "generate FAIL: $($_.Exception.Message)"
            if ($_.Exception.InnerException) { L "INNER: $($_.Exception.InnerException.Message)" }
        }
    }

    # Copy to Frontol share via IP (avoid hostname/cred conflicts)
    if (Test-Path $baza) {
        cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
        cmd /c 'net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y' 2>$null | Out-Null
        $map = cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8'
        L "mapIP=$map"
        try {
            Copy-Item $baza '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt' -Force
            Copy-Item $flag '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt' -Force
            L 'copied to \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In'
        }
        catch { L "copy FAIL: $($_.Exception.Message)" }
        Get-ChildItem '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In' -EA SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object {
            L "IN: $($_.Name) $($_.Length) $($_.LastWriteTime)"
        }
    }
    L 'done'
}
catch {
    L "FATAL: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    if ($_.Exception.InnerException) { L "INNER: $($_.Exception.InnerException.Message)" }
    L $_.ScriptStackTrace
}

  $runner = @"
@echo off
cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 >nul 2>&1
net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y >nul 2>&1

del /q "\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt" 2>nul

"C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe" ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"$user" /Execute "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\ExportFrontolPrice.epf" /Out "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.log"

  $bat = "$bak\run_export_ui.bat"

  # Create task to run interactively in Elena session

    <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    <Hidden>false</Hidden>
    <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle>
    <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun>
    <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT20M</ExecutionTimeLimit>
    <Priority>7</Priority>
  </Settings>
  <Actions Context="Author">
    <Exec>
      <Command>$bat</Command>
    </Exec>
  </Actions>
</Task>
"@
  $xmlPath = "$bak\export_task.xml"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($xmlPath, $xml, [Text.UnicodeEncoding]::new($false,$true))
  $create = schtasks /Create /TN ExportFrontolUI /XML $xmlPath /F 2>&1 | Out-String
  "CREATE=$create"
  $run = schtasks /Run /TN ExportFrontolUI 2>&1 | Out-String
  "RUN=$run"

  # Wait up to 10 min
  $t0 = Get-Date
  while (-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 600) {
    Start-Sleep 10
    $g1 = Test-Path '\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt'
    $g2 = Test-Path '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt'
    if ($g1 -or $g2) { "goods appeared at $([int]((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds)s"; break }
  }
  "DONE_FILE=$(Test-Path $bak\epf_run.done) EXIT=$(Get-Content $bak\epf_run.exit -EA SilentlyContinue)"
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_export_ui.log") { '=== UI LOG ==='; Get-Content "$bak\epf_export_ui.log" -Encoding UTF8 }
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log") { '=== RUN LOG ==='; Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.log" -Encoding Default }
  '=== IN share ==='
  cmd /c 'dir \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In' 2>&1
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id,ProcessName,StartTime -AutoSize
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $binFile = "$bak\ext_dump_offline\CommonModules\ПодключаемоеОборудованиеOfflineВызовСервера\Ext\Module.bin"
  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($binFile)
  $utf8 = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString($bytes)

  # Find ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ and extract surrounding procedures
  $idx = $utf8.IndexOf('ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ')
  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("firstIdx=$idx totalLen=$($utf8.Length)")

  # Find all occurrences
  $search = 0; $n=0
  while (($idx = $utf8.IndexOf('ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ', $search)) -ge 0 -and $n -lt 15) {
    $a = [Math]::Max(0, $idx - 200)
    $b = [Math]::Min($utf8.Length, $idx + 500)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("==== OCC $n at $idx ====")
    [void]$sb.AppendLine($utf8.Substring($a, $b-$a))
    $search = $idx + 1; $n++
  }

  # Also extract &Вместо blocks
  $search=0; $n=0
  while (($idx = $utf8.IndexOf('&Вместо', $search)) -ge 0 -and $n -lt 30) {
    $b = [Math]::Min($utf8.Length, $idx + 200)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("VMESTO $n: " + ($utf8.Substring($idx, $b-$idx) -replace '[\x00-\x08]',''))
    $search = $idx + 1; $n++
  }

  # Try to find readable BSL by looking for Процедура near fill
  $idx = $utf8.IndexOf('Процедура ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ')
  if ($idx -lt 0) { $idx = $utf8.IndexOf('Процедура ОФ') }
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("procIdx=$idx")

  # Save a cleaned version - extract sequences of printable UTF8 that look like BSL
  $cleanPath = "$bak\offline_module_extracted.txt"
  # Strip nulls and non-printable except newlines
  $cleaned = ($utf8 -replace '\0','' -replace '[\x01-\x08\x0b\x0c\x0e-\x1f]','')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($cleanPath, $cleaned, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("cleaned size=$($cleaned.Length)")

  # Find in cleaned
  $idx = $cleaned.IndexOf('ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ')
  if ($idx -ge 0) {
    $a=[Math]::Max(0,$idx-300); $b=[Math]::Min($cleaned.Length,$idx+800)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine('==== CLEANED CONTEXT ====')
    [void]$sb.AppendLine($cleaned.Substring($a,$b-$a))
  }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\offline_extract.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

  $cleaned = ($utf8 -replace '\0','' -replace '[\x01-\x08\x0b\x0c\x0e-\x1f]','')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\offline_module_extracted.txt", $cleaned, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))

  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("cleaned=$($cleaned.Length)")

  $search = 0; $n = 0
  while (($idx = $cleaned.IndexOf('ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ', $search)) -ge 0 -and $n -lt 10) {
    $a = [Math]::Max(0, $idx - 250)
    $b = [Math]::Min($cleaned.Length, $idx + 600)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("==== OCC ${n} at ${idx} ====")
    [void]$sb.AppendLine($cleaned.Substring($a, $b - $a))
    $search = $idx + 1; $n++
  }

  $search = 0; $n = 0
  while (($idx = $cleaned.IndexOf('&Вместо', $search)) -ge 0 -and $n -lt 40) {
    $b = [Math]::Min($cleaned.Length, $idx + 180)
    $frag = $cleaned.Substring($idx, $b - $idx)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("VMESTO ${n}: $frag")
    $search = $idx + 1; $n++
  }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\offline_extract.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

$b64 = Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $cleaned = [IO.File]::ReadAllText("$bak\offline_module_extracted.txt", [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  $sb = New-Object Text.StringBuilder

  foreach ($needle in @(
    'Процедура ОФЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ',
    'Процедура ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ',
    'ОФЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ(',
    'ПродолжитьВызов',
    '#Вставка',
    '#КонецВставки',
    '&ИзменениеИКонтроль',
    'Не задан параметр'
  )) {
    $idx = $cleaned.IndexOf($needle)
    [void]$sb.AppendLine("${needle} => $idx")
    if ($idx -ge 0) {
      $a=[Math]::Max(0,$idx-100); $b=[Math]::Min($cleaned.Length,$idx+1500)
      [void]$sb.AppendLine($cleaned.Substring($a,$b-$a))
      [void]$sb.AppendLine('-----')
    }
  }

  # Count how many 'Процедура ' appear as real BSL
  $m = [regex]::Matches($cleaned, 'Процедура [А-Яа-яA-Za-z0-9_]+\(')
  [void]$sb.AppendLine("BSL-like procedures: $($m.Count)")
  $m | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { [void]$sb.AppendLine($_.Value) }

  [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($sb.ToString()))
}
[IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Users\cherkasov.n\openAIKey\offline_bsl_hunt.txt', [Convert]::FromBase64String($b64))

content.text: В расширении сломан `&Вместо` для `ЗаполнитьПрайсЛистККМ`. Убираю этот перехват, чтобы работал штатный метод.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $dump="$bak\ext_dump_offline"
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))
  $ext = -join ([char[]](0x041E,0x0431,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D)) + 'Frontol'
  $bin='C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe'

  # Backup dump first
  if (Test-Path "$bak\ext_dump_offline_bak") { Remove-Item "$bak\ext_dump_offline_bak" -Recurse -Force }
  Copy-Item $dump "$bak\ext_dump_offline_bak" -Recurse

  $modDir = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*Offline*' } | Select -First 1
  $modXml = Get-ChildItem "$dump\CommonModules" -Filter '*.xml' | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*Offline*' } | Select -First 1
  "Removing $($modDir.FullName)"
  "Removing $($modXml.FullName)"

  # Also patch ConfigDumpInfo.xml and Configuration.xml
  $cfg = Join-Path $dump 'Configuration.xml'
  $info = Join-Path $dump 'ConfigDumpInfo.xml'
  $cfgText = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($cfg, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  $infoText = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($info, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false))
  $name = $modDir.Name

  # Remove CommonModule references containing Offline
  $cfg2 = [regex]::Replace($cfgText, '(?s)<CommonModule>\s*<xr:Item[^>]*>[^<]*Offline[^<]*</xr:Item>\s*</CommonModule>\s*', '')
  $cfg2 = [regex]::Replace($cfg2, '(?s)<xr:Item[^>]*>\s*CommonModule\.' + [regex]::Escape($name) + '\s*</xr:Item>\s*', '')
  # Also simpler: remove lines with Offline module name
  $cfg2 = ($cfg2 -split "`r?`n" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'OfflineВызовСервера' }) -join "`r`n"
  $info2 = ($infoText -split "`r?`n" | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'OfflineВызовСервера' }) -join "`r`n"

  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($cfg, $cfg2, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($info, $info2, [Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  Remove-Item $modDir.FullName -Recurse -Force
  if ($modXml) { Remove-Item $modXml.FullName -Force }

  "cfg still has Offline? $([bool]($cfg2 -match 'OfflineВызовСервера'))"
  "dir exists? $(Test-Path $modDir.FullName)"

  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2

  Remove-Item "$bak\load_offline_fix.log","$bak\update_offline_fix.log" -EA SilentlyContinue
  $a1 = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /LoadConfigFromFiles `"$dump`" -Extension `"$ext`" -updateConfigDumpInfo /Out `"$bak\load_offline_fix.log`""
  $p1 = Start-Process -FilePath $bin -ArgumentList $a1 -Wait -PassThru -NoNewWindow
  "load_exit=$($p1.ExitCode)"
  Get-Content "$bak\load_offline_fix.log" -Encoding Default -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -Last 15

  $a2 = "DESIGNER /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /F `"D:\1C_BACKUP`" /N`"$user`" /UpdateDBCfg -Extension `"$ext`" /Out `"$bak\update_offline_fix.log`""
  $p2 = Start-Process -FilePath $bin -ArgumentList $a2 -Wait -PassThru -NoNewWindow
  "update_exit=$($p2.ExitCode)"
  Get-Content "$bak\update_offline_fix.log" -Encoding Default -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -Last 15
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

# Run export on 1C host
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $user = -join ([char[]](0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418))

  Remove-Item "$bak\epf_export_ui.log","$bak\epf_run.done","$bak\epf_run.exit","$bak\epf_run.log" -Force -EA SilentlyContinue

  # Ensure bat exists with correct user
  $bat = @"
@echo off
cmdkey /add:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9 /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 /pass:usr1cv8 >nul 2>&1
net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /delete /y >nul 2>&1
net use \\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange /user:DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\usr1cv8 usr1cv8
del /q "\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\goods.txt" 2>nul
del /q "\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flag.txt" 2>nul
"C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe" ENTERPRISE /DisableStartupDialogs /DisableStartupMessages /AppAutoCheckVersion- /WA- /F "D:\1C_BACKUP" /N"$user" /Execute "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\ExportFrontolPrice.epf" /Out "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.log"
echo %ERRORLEVEL%> "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.exit"
echo DONE> "D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\epf_run.done"
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\run_export_ui.bat", $bat, [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866))

  schtasks /Run /TN ExportFrontolUI 2>&1 | Out-String

  $t0=Get-Date
  while (-not (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.done") -and ((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds -lt 600) { Start-Sleep 10 }
  "DONE=$(Test-Path $bak\epf_run.done) EXIT=$(Get-Content $bak\epf_run.exit -EA SilentlyContinue) waited=$([int]((Get-Date)-$t0).TotalSeconds)s"
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_export_ui.log") { '===UI==='; Get-Content "$bak\epf_export_ui.log" -Encoding UTF8 }
  if (Test-Path "$bak\epf_run.log") { '===RUN==='; Get-Content "$bak\epf_run.log" -Encoding Default }
  Get-Process 1cv8 -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id,StartTime -AutoSize
}

content.text: Frontol ждёт файлы `.spr`, а не `goods.txt`. Уточняю точные имена в настройках обмена.
Frontol ждёт `касса2 товары.spr` и флаг `flvigr`, а не `goods.txt`. Копирую файлы.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $in = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  $goods = Join-Path $in 'goods.txt'
  if (-not (Test-Path $goods)) { throw 'goods.txt missing' }

  # Exact channel filename from DB (CP866 name)
  $sprName = ([Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866).GetString([Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866).GetBytes('касса2 товары.spr')))
  # Build via chars to be safe in this script
  $sprName = -join ([char[]](
    0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020, # касса2 
    0x0442,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B,0x002E,0x0073,0x0070,0x0072 # товары.spr
  ))
  $sprPath = Join-Path $in $sprName
  Copy-Item $goods $sprPath -Force
  "spr=$sprPath size=$((Get-Item -LiteralPath $sprPath).Length)"

  # Flag: LOADFILEFLAG=flvigr — create empty/marker file
  $flag1 = Join-Path $in 'flvigr'
  $flag2 = Join-Path $in 'flvigr.txt'
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($flag1, [byte[]]@())
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText($flag2, '', [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251))
  # Also keep flag.txt for compatibility
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $in 'flag.txt'), [byte[]]@())

  '=== In folder now ==='
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize

  # Clear old LoadResult so next attempt is clean
  Remove-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out\LoadResult001.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
  'Ready for Загрузка данных'
}

# Also update 1C Kassa#3 params to match Frontol expected names for next unload
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.143.136.109 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $bak='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix'
  $ps1 = @'
$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"
$log="D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\fix_names.log"
function L($t){ Add-Content $log ((Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss)+" "+$t) -Encoding UTF8 }
function U([int[]]$c){-join($c|%{ [char]$_ })}
try {
  Remove-Item $log -EA SilentlyContinue
  $c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
  $u=U @(0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418)
  $conn=$c.Connect("File=`"D:\1C_BACKUP`";Usr=`"$u`";")
  L "connected"
  $q=$conn.NewObject("Query")
  $q.Text=(U @(0x0412,0x042B,0x0411,0x0420,0x0410,0x0422,0x042C))+" T."+(U @(0x0421,0x0441,0x044B,0x043B,0x043A,0x0430))+" " +(U @(0x041A,0x0410,0x041A))+" Ref, T."+(U @(0x041D,0x0430,0x0438,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435))+" "+(U @(0x041A,0x0410,0x041A))+" Nm "+(U @(0x0418,0x0417))+" "+(U @(0x0421,0x043F,0x0440,0x0430,0x0432,0x043E,0x0447,0x043D,0x0438,0x043A))+"."+(U @(0x041E,0x0444,0x043B,0x0430,0x0439,0x043D,0x041E,0x0431,0x043E,0x0440,0x0443,0x0434,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435))+" T "+(U @(0x0413,0x0414,0x0415))+" "+(U @(0x041D,0x0415))+" T."+(U @(0x041F,0x043E,0x043C,0x0435,0x0442,0x043A,0x0430,0x0423,0x0434,0x0430,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0438,0x044F))
  $sel=$q.Execute().Choose()
  $ref=$null
  while($sel.Next()){
    $n=[string]$sel.GetType().InvokeMember("Nm","GetProperty",$null,$sel,$null)
    if($n -match "#3"){ $ref=$sel.GetType().InvokeMember("Ref","GetProperty",$null,$sel,$null); L "sel=$n"; break }
  }
  $m1Name=U @(0x041E,0x0424,0x041C,0x043E,0x0434,0x0443,0x043B,0x044C,0x0410,0x0432,0x0442,0x043E,0x043D,0x043E,0x043C,0x043D,0x043E,0x0441,0x0442,0x0438,0x0031)
  $m1=$conn.GetType().InvokeMember($m1Name,"GetProperty",$null,$conn,$null)
  $du=$m1.GetType().InvokeMember((U @(0x0414,0x0430,0x043D,0x043D,0x044B,0x0435,0x0423,0x0441,0x0442,0x0440,0x043E,0x0439,0x0441,0x0442,0x0432,0x0430)),"InvokeMethod",$null,$m1,@($ref))
  $par=$du.GetType().InvokeMember((U @(0x041F,0x0430,0x0440,0x0430,0x043C,0x0435,0x0442,0x0440,0x044B)),"GetProperty",$null,$du,$null)
  # Update structure fields
  $spr = "\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\" + (-join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x0442,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B,0x002E,0x0073,0x0070,0x0072)))
  $flg = "\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr"
  $par.Insert((U @(0x0411,0x0430,0x0437,0x0430,0x0422,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x043E,0x0432)), $spr)
  $par.Insert((U @(0x0424,0x043B,0x0430,0x0433,0x0412,0x044B,0x0433,0x0440,0x0443,0x0437,0x043A,0x0438)), $flg)
  # Save params back via ValueStorage on catalog item - need proper write API
  # Try ОФМодульАвтономности1 save if exists; else write via object
  $obj = $ref.GetObject()
  $vs = $conn.NewObject("ValueStorage", $par)
  # Find attribute Параметры
  try {
    $obj.GetType().InvokeMember((U @(0x041F,0x0430,0x0440,0x0430,0x043C,0x0435,0x0442,0x0440,0x044B)),"SetProperty",$null,$obj,@($vs))
    $obj.Write()
    L "saved params baza=$spr flag=$flg"
  } catch {
    L "save FAIL: $($_.Exception.Message)"
    # fallback: just log intended paths
    L "INTENDED baza=$spr"
    L "INTENDED flag=$flg"
  }
} catch { L "FATAL $($_.Exception.Message)" }
'@
  $utf16 = New-Object System.Text.UnicodeEncoding $false,$true
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\fix_names.ps1", $ps1, $utf16)
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 1
  $pinfo = New-Object System.Diagnostics.ProcessStartInfo
  $pinfo.FileName = "$env:WINDIR\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe"
  $pinfo.Arguments = "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"$bak\fix_names.ps1`""
  $pinfo.UseShellExecute = $false
  $pinfo.RedirectStandardOutput = $true
  $pinfo.RedirectStandardError = $true
  $p = [Diagnostics.Process]::Start($pinfo)
  $p.WaitForExit(120000) | Out-Null
  if (Test-Path "$bak\fix_names.log") { Get-Content "$bak\fix_names.log" -Encoding UTF8 }
}

content.text:
Причина: Frontol ждёт другие имена файлов.

В настройках обмена:

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $in = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  $out = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out'

  # Ensure source goods exists (from prior unload)
  $src = $null
  foreach ($c in @((Join-Path $in 'goods.txt'), (Join-Path $in 'tov.spr'))) {
    if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $c) { $src = $c; break }
  }
  # also find any .spr
  if (-not $src) {
    $src = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in -Filter '*.spr' -EA SilentlyContinue | Sort Length -Desc | Select -First 1 -Expand FullName
  }
  if (-not $src) { throw 'No goods/tov.spr source in In' }
  "SRC=$src size=$((Get-Item -LiteralPath $src).Length)"

  # Stage clean copies in temp
  $tmp = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_stage'
  if (Test-Path $tmp) { Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force }
  New-Item $tmp -ItemType Directory | Out-Null
  Copy-Item -LiteralPath $src (Join-Path $tmp 'tov.spr') -Force
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $tmp 'flvigr'), [byte[]]@())

  # Wipe In completely then put only needed
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force -Recurse -EA SilentlyContinue
  Copy-Item (Join-Path $tmp 'tov.spr') (Join-Path $in 'tov.spr') -Force
  Copy-Item (Join-Path $tmp 'flvigr') (Join-Path $in 'flvigr') -Force

  # Clean Out results
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $out -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -EA SilentlyContinue

  Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force

  '=== In (clean) ==='
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
  '=== Out (clean) ==='
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $out -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize

  # Try trigger load via FrontolService TCP if protocol known - search strings
  $svc = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\FrontolService.exe'
  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($svc)
  $u = [Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($bytes)
  $cmds = [regex]::Matches($u, 'LoadData|Exchange|Import|Загруз|Exch|DoExch|StartExch|LOAD') |
    ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Select-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 40
  '=== service cmd hints ==='
  $cmds
}
