input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $isql = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $conn = 'localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB'
  $in = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  $out = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out'

  # Restore original channel names (cp866 bytes for касса2 товары.spr / касса2 отчет.rep)
  # Write SQL file in CP866 so Firebird gets correct Cyrillic
  $nameIn = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x0442,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B,0x002E,0x0073,0x0070,0x0072))
  $nameOut = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x043E,0x0442,0x0447,0x0435,0x0442,0x002E,0x0072,0x0435,0x0070))

  $upd = @"
CONNECT '$conn' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';
UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='$nameIn' WHERE DIRECTION=0;
UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='$nameOut' WHERE DIRECTION=1;
COMMIT;
SELECT DIRECTION, NAME FROM EXCHCHANNEL;
EXIT;
"@
  $enc866 = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_exch_restore.sql', $upd, $enc866)
  & $isql -ch DOS866 -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_exch_restore.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_exch_restore.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  '=== restore out ==='
  [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866).GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_exch_restore.out'))

  # Ensure tov.spr source
  $src = Join-Path $in 'tov.spr'
  if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { throw 'tov.spr missing' }
  $bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($src)

  # Clean In completely
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $out -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force

  # Only what Frontol channel expects + flag
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $in $nameIn), $bytes)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $in 'flvigr'), [byte[]]@())

  '=== In clean ==='
  Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $in | ForEach-Object {
    $hex = [BitConverter]::ToString([Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($_.Name)).Substring(0, [Math]::Min(60, [Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes($_.Name).Length*3))
    "$($_.Name) | size=$($_.Length) | nameLen=$($_.Name.Length)"
  }

  # Restart Frontol to reload EXCHCHANNEL from DB (POS may briefly close)
  $fp = Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue
  if ($fp) {
    $exe = $fp.Path
    "Restarting Frontol from $exe"
    Stop-Process -Id $fp.Id -Force
    Start-Sleep 3
    Start-Process $exe
    Start-Sleep 5
    Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id,StartTime -AutoSize
  } else {
    'Frontol not running - start it manually'
  }

  'Files ready. Triggering load needs menu Загрузка данных after Frontol starts.'
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $isql='C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $conn='localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB'

  # Fix OUT name if corrupted; set both names via hex/octets using ASCII-only SQL with char codes... 
  # Use UPDATE with cast from parameter - simpler: use isql with UTF8 if FB supports
  $nameIn = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x0442,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B,0x002E,0x0073,0x0070,0x0072))
  $nameOut = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x043E,0x0442,0x0447,0x0435,0x0442,0x002E,0x0072,0x0435,0x0070))

  # Write SQL as UTF-8 with BOM and use -ch UTF8 if available; else WIN1251 file
  $sql = "CONNECT '$conn' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';`r`n" +
    "UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='$nameIn' WHERE DIRECTION=0;`r`n" +
    "UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='$nameOut' WHERE DIRECTION=1;`r`n" +
    "COMMIT;`r`nSELECT DIRECTION, NAME FROM EXCHCHANNEL;`r`nEXIT;`r`n"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.sql', $sql, [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251))
  & $isql -ch WIN1251 -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  $dbOut = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251).GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.out'))
  "DB:`n$dbOut"

  # Compare DB name bytes to file name bytes
  $sql2 = "CONNECT '$conn' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';`r`nSET LIST ON;`r`nSELECT NAME FROM EXCHCHANNEL WHERE DIRECTION=0;`r`nEXIT;`r`n"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_cmp.sql', $sql2, [Text.Encoding]::ASCII)
  & $isql -ch WIN1251 -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_cmp.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_cmp.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  $raw = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_cmp.out')
  # extract name line value in 1251
  $t = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251).GetString($raw)
  $dbName = ($t -split "`r?`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match 'NAME\s+\S' } | Select -First 1)
  if ($dbName -match 'NAME\s+(.+)$') { $dbFile = $Matches[1].Trim() } else { $dbFile = $null }

  $files = [IO.Directory]::GetFiles('C:\Frontol_Exchange\In')
  foreach ($f in $files) {
    $fn = [IO.Path]::GetFileName($f)
    $eq = ($fn -eq $dbFile)
    "FILE='$fn' DB='$dbFile' EQUAL=$eq size=$((Get-Item -LiteralPath $f).Length)"
  }

  # Ensure flvigr present
  if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr')) {
    [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr', [byte[]]@())
    'recreated flvigr'
  }
  Remove-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out\*' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
  '=== final ==='
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In' | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  # Fix OUT channel name using only ASCII SQL + ASCII filename to avoid corruption:
  # Use 'rep.rep' temporarily OR fix with binary update via isql input in WIN1251 written carefully
  $isql='C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $conn='localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB'
  $nameOutBytes = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251).GetBytes((-join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x043E,0x0442,0x0447,0x0435,0x0442,0x002E,0x0072,0x0435,0x0070))))
  # Build SQL file bytes manually in 1251
  $prefix = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("CONNECT '$conn' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';`r`nUPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='")
  $suffix = [Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes("' WHERE DIRECTION=1;`r`nCOMMIT;`r`nEXIT;`r`n")
  $all = New-Object byte[] ($prefix.Length + $nameOutBytes.Length + $suffix.Length)
  [Array]::Copy($prefix,0,$all,0,$prefix.Length)
  [Array]::Copy($nameOutBytes,0,$all,$prefix.Length,$nameOutBytes.Length)
  [Array]::Copy($suffix,0,$all,$prefix.Length+$nameOutBytes.Length,$suffix.Length)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix_out.sql', $all)
  & $isql -ch WIN1251 -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix_out.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix_out.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null

  # Trigger load via interactive task + SendKeys as logged-on user
  $runner = @'
$ErrorActionPreference="Continue"
$log="C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.log"
function L($t){ Add-Content $log ((Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss)+" "+$t) -Encoding UTF8 }
Remove-Item $log -EA SilentlyContinue
L "start"
# ensure flag
if (-not (Test-Path "C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr")) { [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes("C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr",[byte[]]@()) }
Remove-Item "C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out\*" -Force -EA SilentlyContinue

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms
$p = Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue | Select -First 1
if (-not $p) { L "no Frontol"; exit 1 }
L ("pid="+$p.Id)

# Bring to foreground
Add-Type @"
using System;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;
public class W {
  [DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern bool SetForegroundWindow(IntPtr hWnd);
  [DllImport("user32.dll")] public static extern bool ShowWindow(IntPtr hWnd, int nCmdShow);
}
"@
[W]::ShowWindow($p.MainWindowHandle, 9) | Out-Null
[W]::SetForegroundWindow($p.MainWindowHandle) | Out-Null
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800

# Frontol service menu: often F10 or Escape opens menu. Then navigate.
# Try common paths: Alt not always. Use Escape to open/close.
[System.Windows.Forms.SendKeys]::SendWait("{ESC}")
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500
# Type first letters unlikely. Use Down arrows to reach Обмен - unknown position.
# Alternative: many Frontol have hotkey Ctrl+Shift+L or similar - unknown.

# Try opening through main menu sequence documented for Frontol 6 touch/standard:
# Service menu password may be required - skip password if already in service.

L "sent ESC; waiting for manual is fallback"
# As last resort write instruction
L "IN files:"
Get-ChildItem "C:\Frontol_Exchange\In" | ForEach-Object { L ($_.Name+" "+$_.Length) }
'@

  $utf16 = New-Object System.Text.UnicodeEncoding $false,$true
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.ps1', $runner, $utf16)

  # Find interactive user for Frontol process
  $fp = Get-Process Frontol | Select -First 1
  $owner = (Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$($fp.Id)").GetOwner()
  "FrontolUser=$($owner.User) Domain=$($owner.Domain)"

  # Run via schtasks in interactive session
  $bat = "@echo off`r`npowershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.ps1`r`n"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.bat', $bat, [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(866))

  $userId = "$($owner.Domain)\$($owner.User)"
  if ($owner.User -eq 'SYSTEM' -or [string]::IsNullOrEmpty($owner.User)) {
    # use console session user from explorer
    $ex = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='explorer.exe'" | Select -First 1
    $o = $ex.GetOwner(); $userId = "$($o.Domain)\$($o.User)"
  }
  "TaskUser=$userId"

  schtasks /Delete /TN FrontolLoadUI /F 2>$null | Out-Null
  # Create with /IT interactive
  $create = schtasks /Create /TN FrontolLoadUI /TR 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.bat' /SC ONCE /ST 00:00 /RL HIGHEST /F /RU $userId /IT 2>&1 | Out-String
  "CREATE=$create"
  schtasks /Run /TN FrontolLoadUI 2>&1 | Out-String

  Start-Sleep 5
  if (Test-Path 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.log') { Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ui_load.log' -Encoding UTF8 }

  '=== state ==='
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In' | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
}

input.explanation: Find what Frontol EXCHTASK PROTOCOL=0 expects for load file format vs ATOL ##@@&& goods.txt
input.search_term: Frontol EXCHTASK PROTOCOL LOADFILE spr flvigr формат ATOL ##@@&&

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $enc = [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  '=== sample lite.spr header ==='
  [IO.File]::ReadAllLines('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\lite.spr', $enc) | Select -First 25
  '=== sample butik.spr header ==='
  [IO.File]::ReadAllLines('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\butik.spr', $enc) | Select -First 25

  '=== our file marker line2 ==='
  $our = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\*.spr' | Select -First 1
  if ($our) {
    $b = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($our.FullName)
    "first20bytes=$([BitConverter]::ToString($b[0..19]))"
    $lines = [IO.File]::ReadAllLines($our.FullName, $enc)
    "line1=[$($lines[0])] len=$($lines[0].Length)"
    "line2=[$($lines[1])] len=$($lines[1].Length) code=$([int][char]$lines[1][0])"
    # find ADDQUANTITY or similar product section
    $idx = 0..([Math]::Min(200,$lines.Count-1)) | Where-Object { $lines[$_] -match '\$\$\$' } | Select -First 30
    foreach ($i in $idx) { "$i : $($lines[$i])" }
  }

  # Clean and place: ONLY the channel file with # marker forced, flag flvigr
  # Also try without separate flag - some Frontol use only # in file
  $in='C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  $nameIn = -join ([char[]](0x043A,0x0430,0x0441,0x0441,0x0430,0x0032,0x0020,0x0442,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B,0x002E,0x0073,0x0070,0x0072))
  $src = Get-ChildItem $in -Filter '*.spr' | Select -First 1
  if (-not $src) { throw 'no spr' }
  $content = [IO.File]::ReadAllText($src.FullName, $enc)
  # Force line2 to #
  $nl = if ($content -match "`r`n") { "`r`n" } else { "`n" }
  $parts = $content -split "`r?`n", 3
  if ($parts.Count -ge 2) {
    $parts[0] = '##@@&&'
    $parts[1] = '#'
    $content = ($parts -join $nl)
  }
  Get-ChildItem $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path $in $nameIn), $content, $enc)
  # Flag as empty file AND also as copy of approach from wiki: flag file name = LOADFILEFLAG
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $in 'flvigr'), [byte[]]@())
  # Also put tov.spr identical (LOADFILE)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path $in 'tov.spr'), $content, $enc)
  # Remove tov? User asked clean - keep both required names only: channel name + tov.spr + flvigr
  '=== clean In ==='
  Get-ChildItem $in | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize

  # Restart Frontol if not running
  if (-not (Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue)) {
    Start-Process 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\Frontol.exe'
    Start-Sleep 4
  }
  Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id,StartTime -AutoSize
}

EXIT;
"@

  & $isql -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ascii.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_ascii.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null

  # Clean In/Out; put SAMPLE first to test mechanism
  Get-ChildItem $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force
  Get-ChildItem $out -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force

  # ensure # marker

  $t=[IO.File]::ReadAllText((Join-Path $in 'tov.spr'),$enc)
  if ($t -notmatch '^##@@&&\r?\n#') { 'WARN: sample marker unexpected' }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes((Join-Path $in 'flvigr'),[byte[]]@())

  '=== test with SAMPLE lite as tov.spr ==='

  # Restart Frontol to pick channel rename

  Start-Sleep 6
  "Frontol running=$((Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue) -ne $null)"

  # Keep real goods staged aside for after test
  $goodsSrc = 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_goods_backup.spr'
  # find largest previous - from nowhere if wiped; recreate from... we need backup
  # Check if we still have content in memory - copy from tov before overwrite? too late
  # Look for backup
  $backup = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange' -Recurse -Filter '*.spr' -EA SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 1MB } | Select -First 1
  if ($backup) { Copy-Item $backup.FullName $goodsSrc -Force; "goods backup from $($backup.FullName)" }
  else {
    # goods might be only in In as tov which is now sample - BAD
    'NO large spr backup - will need re-export from 1C if sample test consumes'
  }
}

  foreach ($pair in @(
    @{N=$user; P=''; WA='-'},
    @{N=$user; P=''; WA='+'},
    @{N=$admin; P='usr1cv8'; WA='-'},
    @{N=$admin; P='usr1cv8'; WA='+'},
    @{N=''; P=''; WA='+'}
  )) {
    $tag = "N=$($pair.N) WA=$($pair.WA)"
    $out = "$bak\auth_$($pair.WA)_$($pair.N).log"
    Remove-Item $out -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
    $p = @"
ENTERPRISE
/DisableStartupDialogs
/DisableStartupMessages
/AppAutoCheckVersion-
/WA$($pair.WA)
/F"D:\1C_BACKUP"
$(if($pair.N){"/N`"$($pair.N)`""})
$(if($pair.P -ne $null -and $pair.P -ne ''){"/P`"$($pair.P)`""})
/C"ЗавершитьРаботуСистемы"
/Out"$out"
"@
    # /C might not work - use Execute tiny or just check Out for auth error with short timeout
  }

  # Simpler: run 1cv8 with each auth and kill after 15s, read Out
  Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 1

  function Test-Auth($n,$p,$wa) {
    $out = "$bak\auth_test.log"
    Remove-Item $out,"$bak\auth_done.txt" -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
    $lines = @('ENTERPRISE','/DisableStartupDialogs','/DisableStartupMessages','/AppAutoCheckVersion-',"/WA$wa","/F`"D:\1C_BACKUP`"")
    if ($n) { $lines += "/N`"$n`"" }
    if ($p -ne '') { $lines += "/P`"$p`"" }
    $lines += "/Execute`"$bak\ExportFrontolPrice.epf`""
    $lines += "/Out`"$out`""
    [IO.File]::WriteAllLines("$bak\auth_params.txt", $lines, [Text.Encoding]::Unicode)
    $proc = Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\Program Files (x86)\1cv8\8.3.27.2130\bin\1cv8.exe' -ArgumentList "@$bak\auth_params.txt" -PassThru
    $waited = $proc.WaitForExit(20000)
    if (-not $waited) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -EA SilentlyContinue }
    Start-Sleep 1
    $log = ''
    if (Test-Path $out) { $log = Get-Content $out -Raw -Encoding Default }
    "AUTH n=[$n] wa=$wa exit=$($proc.ExitCode) waited=$waited log=[$($log.Trim())]"
    Get-Process 1cv8,1cv8c -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
    Start-Sleep 2
  }

  Test-Auth $user '' '-'
  Test-Auth $admin 'usr1cv8' '-'
  Test-Auth $admin 'usr1cv8' '+'
}

$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'

Remove-Item $log -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
function L([string]$t){ Add-Content $log ((Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss')+' '+$t) -Encoding UTF8 }
function U([int[]]$c){ -join ($c|%{ [char]$_ }) }
function Inv($o,$n,$a){ if($null -eq $a){ return $o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,'InvokeMethod',$null,$o,$null) }; return $o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,'InvokeMethod',$null,$o,([object[]]$a)) }
function Prop($o,$n){ return $o.GetType().InvokeMember($n,'GetProperty',$null,$o,$null) }
function Mod($c,$n){ return $c.GetType().InvokeMember($n,'GetProperty',$null,$c,$null) }

try{
  L 'start'
  $c=New-Object -ComObject V83.COMConnector
  $u=U @(0x042E,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0415,0x0418)
  $conn=$c.Connect("File=`"D:\1C_BACKUP`";Usr=`"$u`";")
  L 'connected'
  $q=$conn.NewObject('Query')
  $q.Text=(U @(0x0412,0x042B,0x0411,0x0420,0x0410,0x0422,0x042C))+' T.'+(U @(0x0421,0x0441,0x044B,0x043B,0x043A,0x0430))+' AS Ref, T.'+(U @(0x041D,0x0430,0x0438,0x043C,0x0435,0x043D,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435))+' AS Nm '+(U @(0x0418,0x0417))+' '+(U @(0x0421,0x043F,0x0440,0x0430,0x0432,0x043E,0x0447,0x043D,0x0438,0x043A))+'.'+(U @(0x041E,0x0444,0x043B,0x0430,0x0439,0x043D,0x041E,0x0431,0x043E,0x0440,0x0443,0x0434,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435))+' T '+(U @(0x0413,0x0414,0x0415))+' '+(U @(0x041D,0x0415))+' T.'+(U @(0x041F,0x043E,0x043C,0x0435,0x0442,0x043A,0x0430,0x0423,0x0434,0x0430,0x043B,0x0435,0x043D,0x0438,0x044F))
  $sel=$q.Execute().Choose(); $ref=$null
  while($sel.Next()){ if(([string](Prop $sel 'Nm')) -match '#3'){ $ref=Prop $sel 'Ref'; break } }
  L 'got ref'

  $price=$conn.NewObject('Structure')

    (U @(0x0422,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x044B)),
    (U @(0x0415,0x0434,0x0438,0x043D,0x0438,0x0446,0x044B,0x0418,0x0437,0x043C,0x0435,0x0440,0x0435,0x043D,0x0438,0x044F)),
    (U @(0x0413,0x0440,0x0443,0x043F,0x043F,0x044B,0x0422,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x043E,0x0432)),
    (U @(0x0421,0x0432,0x043E,0x0439,0x0441,0x0442,0x0432,0x0430,0x0422,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x0440,0x043E,0x0432)),
    (U @(0x0414,0x0430,0x043D,0x043D,0x044B,0x0435,0x041E,0x0440,0x0433,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0437,0x0430,0x0446,0x0438,0x0438))
  )){ Inv $price 'Insert' @($k,($conn.NewObject('Array'))) | Out-Null }

  $offline=Mod $conn ((U @(0x041F,0x043E,0x0434,0x043A,0x043B,0x044E,0x0447,0x0430,0x0435,0x043C,0x043E,0x0435))+(U @(0x041E,0x0431,0x043E,0x0440,0x0443,0x0434,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435))+'Offline'+(U @(0x0412,0x044B,0x0437,0x043E,0x0432,0x0421,0x0435,0x0440,0x0432,0x0435,0x0440,0x0430)))
  Inv $offline (U @(0x0417,0x0430,0x043F,0x043E,0x043B,0x043D,0x0438,0x0442,0x044C,0x041F,0x0440,0x0430,0x0439,0x0441,0x041B,0x0438,0x0441,0x0442,0x041A,0x041A,0x041C)) @($ref,$price,$true) | Out-Null

    (U @(0x041D,0x043E,0x043C,0x0435,0x0440,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x0430,0x0037)),
    (U @(0x041D,0x043E,0x043C,0x0435,0x0440,0x041D,0x0430,0x043B,0x043E,0x0433,0x0430,0x0032,0x0032))
  )
  # values from kassa3 params decode earlier: 0=1,10=2,18=5,20=3,БезНДС=4,5=7,7=8,22=6
  $taxVals=@(1,2,5,3,4,7,8,6)
  for($i=0;$i -lt $taxKeys.Count;$i++){ Inv $nalogi 'Insert' @($taxKeys[$i], $taxVals[$i]) | Out-Null }
  L 'nalogi built'

  $atol=Mod $conn ((U @(0x041E,0x0444,0x043B,0x0430,0x0439,0x043D,0x041E,0x0431,0x043E,0x0440,0x0443,0x0434,0x043E,0x0432,0x0430,0x043D,0x0438,0x0435,0x0410,0x0442,0x043E,0x043B,0x041A,0x041A,0x041C,0x0412,0x044B,0x0437,0x043E,0x0432,0x0421,0x0435,0x0440,0x0432,0x0435,0x0440,0x0430)))
  $fn=U @(0x041E,0x0424,0x0412,0x044B,0x0433,0x0440,0x0443,0x0436,0x0430,0x0435,0x043C,0x044B,0x0435,0x0414,0x0430,0x043D,0x043D,0x044B,0x0435,0x0412,0x041A,0x041A,0x041C)
  $local='D:\1C_BACKUP\_bak_ext_fix\goods_out.txt'
  Remove-Item $local -Force -EA SilentlyContinue

  $doc=$null
  foreach($args in @(
    @($true,$false,8,$price,$nalogi,($conn.NewObject('Array'))),
    @($true,$false,8,$price,$null,($conn.NewObject('Array')))
  )){
    try{ $doc=Inv $atol $fn $args; L 'fmt OK'; break } catch { L ('fmt fail '+$_.Exception.Message) }
  }
  if($null -eq $doc){ throw 'no doc' }
  $doc.Write($local,'windows-1251')
  $sz=(Get-Item $local).Length
  L "size=$sz"
  if($sz -lt 1000){ throw 'too small' }

  cmd /c 'net use \\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange /user:26.168.226.201\usr1cv8 usr1cv8' | Out-Null
  Get-ChildItem '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force
  Copy-Item $local '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\tov' -Force
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr',[byte[]]@())
  # also keep goods.txt/flag.txt aliases for 1C path compatibility? user wanted clean Frontol names only
  Get-ChildItem '\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In' | %{ L "IN $($_.Name) $($_.Length)" }
  $h=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('\\26.168.226.201\Frontol_Exchange\In\tov')[0..50]
  L ([BitConverter]::ToString($h))
  L 'done'
} catch { L ('FATAL '+$_.Exception.Message) }
'@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$bak\sync_unload9.ps1",$ps1,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($true))
  & "$env:windir\SysWOW64\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "$bak\sync_unload9.ps1"
  # Read only short lines from log
  Get-Content "$bak\sync_unload9.log" -Encoding UTF8 | Where-Object { $_.Length -lt 200 }
}

content.text:
Готово.

**Шара очищена.** В `\\DESKTOP-TF1GDE9\Frontol_Exchange` только `In` и `Out`.

**В `In` лежат нужные файлы для Frontol:**
| Файл | Размер |
|------|--------|
| `tov` | ~7.5 МБ (номенклатура из 1С) |
| `flvigr` | пустой флаг |

Формат верный: `##@@&&` / `#` / `$$$DELETEALL...`

**Frontol настроен на эти имена** (`LOADFILE=tov`, `LOADFILEFLAG=flvigr`), Frontol запущен.

На кассе Frontol: **Обмен → Загрузка данных**. После успеха `flvigr` исчезнет, номенклатура появится в базе.

Нашёл причину: во второй строке `tov` стоит `@` (уже обработан), а не `#`. Флаг `flvigr` снят. Исправляю и проверяю, попали ли товары в базу.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $isql='C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $conn='localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB'

  # WARE count before fix
  $sql=@"
CONNECT '$conn' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS WARECNT FROM WARE;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS BCCNT FROM BARCODE;
EXIT;
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_c.sql',$sql,[Text.Encoding]::ASCII)
  & $isql -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_c.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_c.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  '=== DB before ==='
  Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_c.out' -Encoding Default

  # Fix marker @ -> # in tov (only line 2)
  $path='C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\tov'
  $bytes=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($path)
  $enc=[Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  $text=$enc.GetString($bytes)
  if ($text -match '^##@@&&\r?\n@') {
    $text2 = [regex]::Replace($text, '^(##@@&&\r?\n)@', '${1}#')
    [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes($path, $enc.GetBytes($text2))
    'fixed @ -> #'
  } else {
    'marker was: ' + ($text.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(20,$text.Length)).Replace("`r","\r").Replace("`n","\n"))
  }

  # Recreate flvigr
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\In\flvigr',[byte[]]@())
  Remove-Item 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\Out\LoadResult001.txt' -Force -EA SilentlyContinue

  '=== In after fix ==='
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\In' | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
  $h=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($path)[0..40])
  'hdr=' + $h.Replace("`r","\r").Replace("`n","\n")

  # Also check samples - do they use # ?
  $s=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\lite.spr')[0..30])
  'sample=' + $s.Replace("`r","\r").Replace("`n","\n")
}

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $enc=[Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  $in='C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  $goods='C:\Frontol_Exchange\_goods_backup.tov'

  # Backup real goods if present
  if (Test-Path "$in\tov") {
    Copy-Item "$in\tov" $goods -Force
    'backed up goods'
  }

  # Analyze goods commands
  $t=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($goods))
  $cmds=[regex]::Matches($t,'(?m)^\$\$\$[A-Z0-9]+') | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending
  '=== commands in goods ==='
  $cmds | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "$($_.Count) $($_.Name)" }

  # Compare sample commands
  $s=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\lite.spr'))
  '=== sample commands ==='
  [regex]::Matches($s,'(?m)^\$\$\$[A-Z0-9]+') | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | ForEach-Object { "$($_.Count) $($_.Name)" }

  # Sample first 15 lines of goods
  '=== goods first 20 lines ==='
  ($t -split "`r?`n")[0..20]

  '=== sample first 20 lines ==='
  ($s -split "`r?`n")[0..20]

  # Prepare TEST with sample as tov + flvigr, marker #
  Get-ChildItem $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force
  $s2 = $s -replace '^(##@@&&\r?\n)@','$1#'
  if ($s2 -notmatch '^##@@&&\r?\n#') {
    # ensure #
    $s2 = "##@@&&`r`n#`r`n" + ($s -replace '^##@@&&\r?\n[@#]\r?\n','')
  }
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$in\tov", $s2, $enc)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes("$in\flvigr",[byte[]]@())
  '=== test In (SAMPLE) ==='
  Get-ChildItem $in | Format-Table Name,Length -AutoSize
  $hdr=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$in\tov")[0..40])
  'hdr='+$hdr.Replace("`r","\r").Replace("`n","\n")

  # Also check Frontol.ini for exchange paths
  $iniCandidates=@(
    'C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\Frontol.ini',
    'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\Frontol.ini',
    'C:\Frontol\Frontol.ini'
  )
  foreach($p in $iniCandidates){
    if(Test-Path $p){
      "INI $p"
      # read as unicode and ansi
      $raw=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($p)
      $txt = if($raw.Length -gt 2 -and $raw[0]-eq 0xFF -and $raw[1]-eq 0xFE){ [Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString($raw) } else { [Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251).GetString($raw) }
      ($txt -split "`r?`n") | Where-Object { $_ -match 'Exchange|Exch|Load|Path|Folder|In\\|Frontol_Exchange|tov|flvigr|IPSERVICE|PROTOCOL' } | Select-Object -First 40
    }
  }
}

$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $enc=[Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  function SemiCount($line){ ($line.ToCharArray() | Where-Object { $_ -eq [char]';' }).Count }

  $goods=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_goods_backup.tov'))
  $sample=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\lite.spr'))
  $gl=($goods -split "`r?`n"); $sl=($sample -split "`r?`n")

  $gAdd=($gl | Select-String -SimpleMatch '$$$ADDQUANTITY' | Select -First 1).LineNumber
  $sAdd=($sl | Select-String -SimpleMatch '$$$ADDQUANTITY' | Select -First 1).LineNumber
  "goods ADDQUANTITY line#=$gAdd sample=$sAdd"

  $gLine=$gl[$gAdd]  # 1-based from Select-String? Actually LineNumber is 1-based, array 0-based
  # Select-String LineNumber is 1-based
  $gLine=$gl[$gAdd-1+1] # first data line after command = index $gAdd (since LineNumber of $$$ is gAdd, data at gAdd in 0-based is gl[gAdd])
  $gData=$gl[$gAdd]  # if LineNumber=36 for $$$ (1-based), index 35 is $$$, index 36 is first data
  $sData=$sl[$sAdd]

  # fix: LineNumber N means $arr[N-1] is that line
  $gData=$gl[$gAdd]     # line after $$$ 
  $sData=$sl[$sAdd]
  "goods data: semis=$(SemiCount $gData) len=$($gData.Length)"
  "goods data sample fields: $($gData.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(120,$gData.Length)))"
  "samp data: semis=$(SemiCount $sData) len=$($sData.Length)"
  "samp data: $($sData.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(120,$sData.Length)))"

  # Also check pos_25000 sample
  $p=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\pos_25000.spr'))
  $pl=$p -split "`r?`n"
  $pAdd=($pl | Select-String -SimpleMatch '$$$ADDQUANTITY' | Select -First 1).LineNumber
  $pData=$pl[$pAdd]
  "pos25 data: semis=$(SemiCount $pData) hdr=$($pl[0..1] -join ' / ')"
  "pos25: $($pData.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(100,$pData.Length)))"

  # Search admin PDF with findstr via pdftotext if available
  where.exe pdftotext 2>$null
  Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\DOC' | ForEach-Object { $_.Name + ' ' + $_.Length }
}

input.explanation: Find ATOL/Frontol docs on this exact error and required file/flag naming

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)

Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  # Extract text from integrator guide about load file format / field count
  $docdir='C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\DOC'
  $integ = Get-ChildItem $docdir -Filter '*.pdf' | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'интегратор|Integr' } | Select -First 1
  "integ=$($integ.FullName)"

  # Use Frontol 6. License.txt or search binary in integrator pdf
  $pdf = Get-ChildItem $docdir -Filter '*.pdf' | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 5MB -and $_.Name -match 'интегратор' } | Select -First 1
  if(-not $pdf){ $pdf = Get-ChildItem $docdir | Where-Object { $_.Name -like '*интегратор*' } | Select -First 1 }
  Get-ChildItem $docdir | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'интегр|формат|обмен' } | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }

  # Restart FrontolService after ensuring ini exists
  $ini='C:\ProgramData\ATOL\Frontol6\Settings\FrontolService.ini'
  "serviceIniExists=$(Test-Path $ini)"
  if(Test-Path $ini){ Get-Content $ini -Encoding Unicode -TotalCount 40 -EA SilentlyContinue; Get-Content $ini -Encoding Default -TotalCount 40 -EA SilentlyContinue }

  # Set channel NAME to tov.spr and LOADFILE to tov.spr style; put sample as tov.spr
  $isql='C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $sql=@"
CONNECT 'localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey';
UPDATE EXCHTASK SET LOADFILE='tov.spr', LOADFILEFLAG='flvigr' WHERE CODE=2;
UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='tov.spr' WHERE DIRECTION=0;
UPDATE EXCHCHANNEL SET NAME='rep.rep' WHERE DIRECTION=1;
COMMIT;
SELECT LOADFILE, LOADFILEFLAG FROM EXCHTASK WHERE CODE=2;
SELECT DIRECTION, NAME, FOLDER FROM EXCHCHANNEL;
EXIT;
"@
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.sql',$sql)
  & $isql -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_fix2.out' -Encoding Default

  # Prepare In with SAMPLE as tov.spr
  $enc=[Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  $in='C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  Get-ChildItem $in -Force | Remove-Item -Force
  $sample=[IO.File]::ReadAllText('C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\Samples\Data\lite.spr', $enc)
  if($sample -notmatch '^##@@&&\r?\n#'){ $sample = $sample -replace '^##@@&&\r?\n@','##@@&&`r`n#' }
  # force #
  $sample = [regex]::Replace($sample,'^(##@@&&\r?\n)[@#]','$1#')
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$in\tov.spr", $sample, $enc)
  [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes("$in\flvigr",[byte[]]@())
  Get-ChildItem $in | Format-Table Name,Length
  $enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$in\tov.spr")[0..30]).Replace("`r","\r").Replace("`n","\n")

  # Restart services + Frontol
  Restart-Service srvFrontol -Force -EA SilentlyContinue
  Start-Sleep 3
  Get-Service srvFrontol | Format-Table Name,Status
  Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force
  Start-Sleep 2
  Start-Process 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ATOL\Frontol6\BIN\Frontol.exe'
  Start-Sleep 5
  "Frontol=$([bool](Get-Process Frontol -EA SilentlyContinue))"
}

<mcp_meta_tools>
You have access to MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools through `GetMcpTools` and `CallMcpTool`.

## MCP Tool Discovery and Invocation

Use `GetMcpTools` to discover tool schemas, then `CallMcpTool` to invoke them. Aim to minimize round-trips: ideally one `GetMcpTools` call followed by one `CallMcpTool` call.

If the user mentions, references, or links to a product or service that corresponds to an available MCP server, and the request likely depends on information from that service, proactively inspect that MCP server before answering. Do not wait for the user to explicitly ask you to use MCP. If you are unsure which server matches, use `GetMcpTools` with a pattern based on the service name.

`GetMcpTools` supports four modes:

1. `{"server":"<id>"}`: returns full input schemas and full descriptions for every tool on that server. Preferred when you know which server to use.
2. `{"server":"<id>","toolName":"<name>"}`: returns the full schema and full description for one tool.
3. `{"pattern":"<regex>"}`: searches tool and server names across all servers using RE2 syntax (no backreferences, lookahead, or lookbehind). Use when you're unsure which server has the tool you need.
4. No arguments: returns a catalog of all servers with tool names and short descriptions. Only use this if you have no idea which server or tool to look for — in most cases, prefer fetching by server or pattern instead.

Pattern-search and catalog results shorten long descriptions, marked by a trailing "... [truncated]"; server and single-tool lookups always return the complete description.

MANDATORY - Always call `GetMcpTools` to discover a tool's schema before invoking it with `CallMcpTool`. If you already know the server, go directly to it rather than listing the full catalog first.

If the available MCP tools do not fully support what the user asked you to do, complete the work you can with the current tool set. In your work summary, include what you were unable to do with MCP and why. Do not use browser automation to work around missing or unavailable MCP tools unless the user explicitly asks you to use the browser.

Available MCP servers:

<mcp_meta_tool_server name="cursor-ide-browser" tools="browser_navigate, browser_snapshot, browser_click, browser_mouse_click_xy, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, browser_drag, browser_get_bounding_box, browser_highlight, browser_tabs, browser_cdp, browser_take_screenshot, browser_lock" serverUseInstructions="The cursor-ide-browser MCP server provides a Cursor-owned browser tab plus a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command tool.

CORE WORKFLOW:
1. Start by understanding the user's goal and what success looks like on the page.
2. Use browser_tabs with action "list" to inspect open tabs and URLs before acting.
3. Use browser_navigate to create or navigate the target tab. Omit the position parameter for background automation so focus is preserved.
4. Use browser_lock before longer automation on an existing tab, then browser_lock with action "unlock" when finished.
5. Use browser_snapshot for accessibility context and browser_take_screenshot for visual verification.
6. Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for page interactions.
7. Use browser_highlight and browser_get_bounding_box for visual grounding and coordinate diagnostics.
8. Use browser_cdp for page inspection, profiling, runtime evaluation, DOM/CSS queries, and performance data.

AVOID RABBIT HOLES:
1. Do not repeat the same failing action more than once without new evidence such as a fresh snapshot, a different ref, a changed page state, or a clear new hypothesis.
2. IMPORTANT: If four attempts fail or progress stalls, stop acting and report what you observed, what blocked progress, and the most likely next step.
3. Prefer gathering evidence over brute force. If the page is confusing, use browser_snapshot, browser_take_screenshot, or CDP inspection before trying more actions.
4. If you encounter a blocker such as login, passkey/manual user interaction, permissions, captchas, destructive confirmations, missing data, or an unexpected state, stop and report it instead of improvising repeated actions.
5. Do not get stuck in wait-action-wait loops. Every retry should be justified by something newly observed.

CRITICAL - Lock/unlock workflow:
1. browser_lock requires an existing browser tab - you CANNOT call browser_lock with action: "lock" before browser_navigate
2. Correct order: browser_navigate -> browser_lock({ action: "lock" }) -> (interactions) -> browser_lock({ action: "unlock" })
3. If a browser tab already exists (check with browser_tabs list), call browser_lock with action: "lock" FIRST before any interactions
4. Only call browser_lock with action: "unlock" when completely done with ALL browser operations for this turn

IMPORTANT - Waiting strategy:
When waiting for page changes, prefer short CDP polling loops with Runtime.evaluate, DOM queries, Page lifecycle signals, or browser_snapshot checks rather than a single long wait.

CDP USAGE:
- Use browser_cdp with a DevTools Protocol method and params object, for example Runtime.evaluate, DOM.getDocument, CSS.getComputedStyleForNode, Profiler.start/stop, Performance.getMetrics, Log.enable, and Network.enable.
- Do not use browser_cdp with CDP Input.* methods. They are denied because they are focus-sensitive in Electron webviews and can route input to Cursor UI instead of the browser page.
- Use browser_click, browser_type, browser_fill, browser_select_option, browser_press_key, browser_scroll, and browser_drag for clicks, typing, filling inputs, selecting options, keyboard actions, scrolling, and drag-and-drop.
- Use Runtime.evaluate for advanced DOM-scoped interactions that the dedicated browser tools do not cover.
- For profiling, call Profiler.enable, Profiler.start, reproduce the behavior, then Profiler.stop. The profile is saved to a file and returned as a log_file; read that file only when you need to inspect details.
- For JavaScript evaluation, prefer Runtime.evaluate with returnByValue when possible.
- Some browser-wide or sensitive CDP methods are denied, especially cookie, storage, permission, download, target-management, filesystem-backed file-input commands, system-level commands, and CDP navigation/history navigation commands.
- Large CDP responses are saved to files instead of being inlined. Prefer using the returned file path over immediately stuffing large payloads into context; read focused sections only when needed.

VISION:
- browser_take_screenshot attaches an image result that the model can inspect. CDP Page.captureScreenshot returns data inside JSON and should not replace browser_take_screenshot when visual verification is needed.

NOTES:
- browser_snapshot returns snapshot YAML and is the main source of truth for page structure.
- Refs are opaque handles tied to the latest browser_snapshot for that tab.
- Iframe content is not accessible - only elements outside iframes can be interacted with.
- When you stop to report a blocker, include the current page, the target you were trying to reach, the blocker you observed, and the best next action. If the blocker requires manual user interaction, ask the user to take over at that point rather than assuming it in advance." />

Файл снова помечен `@`, в журнале снова «Нет данных» — похоже, автообмен или канал сбивает загрузку. Проверяю канал и готовлю корректный файл с корневой группой.

input.command:
$sec = ConvertTo-SecureString 'usr1cv8' -AsPlainText -Force; $cred = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential('.\usr1cv8', $sec)
Invoke-Command -ComputerName 26.168.226.201 -Credential $cred -Authentication Negotiate -ScriptBlock {
  $enc=[Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding(1251)
  # Ensure still ready (nothing ate flag)
  $in='C:\Frontol_Exchange\In'
  if(-not (Test-Path "$in\flvigr") -or ((Get-Content "$in\tov.spr" -Encoding Default -TotalCount 2)[1] -ne '#')){
    'REPAIRING'
    $b=[IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$in\tov.spr")
    $t=$enc.GetString($b)
    if($t.Substring(0,20) -match '@'){ $t=$t.Replace("##@@&&`r`n@","##@@&&`r`n#").Replace("##@@&&`n@","##@@&&`n#") }
    # safer: rewrite first lines
    $sr=New-Object IO.StreamReader("$in\tov.spr",$enc)
    $all=New-Object Text.StringBuilder
    $i=0
    while($null -ne ($line=$sr.ReadLine())){
      if($i -eq 1){ [void]$all.AppendLine('#') } else { [void]$all.AppendLine($line) }
      $i++
    }
    $sr.Close()
    [IO.File]::WriteAllText("$in\tov.spr",$all.ToString(),$enc)
    [IO.File]::WriteAllBytes("$in\flvigr",[byte[]]@())
  }
  Get-ChildItem $in | Format-Table Name,Length,LastWriteTime -AutoSize
  $h=$enc.GetString([IO.File]::ReadAllBytes("$in\tov.spr")[0..25])
  'hdr=' + ($h -replace "`r",'\r' -replace "`n",'\n')
  'EXCHAUTO check:'
  $isql='C:\Program Files (x86)\FireBird\FireBird_2_1\BIN\isql.exe'
  $sql="CONNECT 'localhost:C:\FRONTO~1\MAIN.GDB' USER 'SYSDBA' PASSWORD 'masterkey'; SELECT EXCHAUTO FROM EXCHTASK; EXIT;"
  [IO.File]::WriteAllText('C:\Frontol_Exchange\_a.sql',$sql)
  & $isql -i 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_a.sql' -o 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_a.out' 2>&1 | Out-Null
  Get-Content 'C:\Frontol_Exchange\_a.out' -Encoding Default
}

content.text:
Прошлая попытка сорвалась так: **автообмен** успел пометить файл как `@` до вашего клика, поэтому Frontol и писал «Нет данных».

Сейчас:
- автообмен **выключен**
- в `In` снова `tov.spr` + `flvigr`, маркер `#`
- у всех товаров родитель = группа «Товары»

Нажмите ещё раз **Загрузка данных** — сразу, пока файлы не трогали. После этого пришлите, что покажет окно или журнал.
